specific language governing permissions and\n12: // limitations under the License.\n13: \n14: package v1\n15: \n16: import (\n17: \t\"context\"\n18: \t\"encoding/json\"\n19: \t\"errors\"\n20: \t\"fmt\"\n21: \t\"io\"\n22: \t\"net/http\"\n23: \t\"net/http/httptest\"\n24: \t\"net/url\"\n25: \t\"os\"\n26: \t\"reflect\"\n27: \t\"runtime\"\n28: \t\"sort\"\n29: \t\"strconv\"\n30: \t\"strings\"\n31: \t\"testing\"\n32: \t\"time\"\n33: \n34: \tjsoniter \"github.com/json-iterator/go\"\n35: \t\"github.com/oklog/ulid/v2\"\n36: \t\"github.com/prometheus/client_golang/prometheus\"\n37: \tconfig_util \"github.com/prometheus/common/config\"\n38: \t\"github.com/prometheus/common/model\"\n39: \t\"github.com/prometheus/common/promslog\"\n40: \t\"github.com/prometheus/common/route\"\n41: \t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/require\"\n42: \n43: \t\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/config\"\n44: \t\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/model/exemplar\"\n45: \t\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/model/labels\"\n46: \t\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/model/metadata\"\n47: \t\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/model/timestamp\"\n48: \t\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/prompb\"\n49: \t\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/promql\"\n50: \t\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/promql/parser\"\n51: \t\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/promql/promqltest\"\n52: \t\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/rules\"\n53: \t\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/scrape\"\n54: \t\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/storage\"\n55: \t\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/storage/remote\"\n56: \t\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/tsdb\"\n57: \t\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/util/stats\"\n58: \t\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/util/teststorage\"\n59: \t\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/util/testutil\"\n60: )\n61: \n62: func testEngine(t *testing.T) *promql.Engine {\n63: \tt.Helper()\n64: \treturn promqltest.NewTestEngineWithOpts(t, promql.EngineOpts{\n65: \t\tLogger:                   nil,\n66: \t\tReg:                      nil,\n67: \t\tMaxSamples:               10000,\n68: \t\tTimeout:                  100 * time.Second,\n69: \t\tNoStepSubqueryIntervalFn: func(int64) int64 { return 60 * 1000 },\n70: \t\tEnableAtModifier:         true,\n71: \t\tEnableNegativeOffset:     true,\n72: \t\tEnablePerStepStats:       true,\n73: \t})\n74: }\n75: \n76: // testMetaStore satisfies the scrape.MetricMetadataStore interface.\n77: // It is used to inject specific metadata as part of a test case.\n78: type testMetaStore struct {\n79: \tMetadata []scrape.MetricMetadata\n80: }\n81: \n82: func (s *testMetaStore) ListMetadata() []scrape.MetricMetadata {\n83: \treturn s.Metadata\n84: }\n85: \n86: func (s *testMetaStore) GetMetadata(metric string) (scrape.MetricMetadata, bool) {\n87: \tfor _, m := range s.Metadata {\n88: \t\tif metric == m.MetricFamily {\n89: \t\t\treturn m, true\n90: \t\t}\n91: \t}\n92: \n93: \treturn scrape.MetricMetadata{}, false\n94: }\n95: \n96: func (*testMetaStore) SizeMetadata() int   { return 0 }\n97: func (*testMetaStore) LengthMetadata() int { return 0 }\n98: \n99: // testTargetRetriever represents a list of targets to scrape.\n100: // It is used to represent targets as part of test cases.\n101: type testTargetRetriever struct {\n102: \tactiveTargets  map[string][]*scrape.Target\n103: \tdroppedTargets map[string][]*scrape.Target\n104: }\n105: \n106: type testTargetParams struct {\n107: \tIdentifier   string\n108: \tLabels       labels.Labels\n109: \ttargetLabels model.LabelSet\n110: \tParams       url.Values\n111: \tReports      []*testReport\n112: \tActive       bool\n113: }\n114: \n115: type testReport struct {\n116: \tStart    time.Time\n117: \tDuration time.Duration\n118: \tError    error\n119: }\n120: \n121: func newTestTargetRetriever(targetsInfo []*testTargetParams) *testTargetRetriever {\n122: \tvar activeTargets map[string][]*scrape.Target\n123: \tvar droppedTargets map[string][]*scrape.Target\n124: \tactiveTargets = make(map[string][]*scrape.Target)\n125: \tdroppedTargets = make(map[string][]*scrape.Target)\n126: \n127: \tfor _, t := range targetsInfo {\n128: \t\tnt := scrape.NewTarget(t.Labels, &config.ScrapeConfig{Params: t.Params}, t.targetLabels, nil)\n129: \n130: \t\tfor _, r := range t.Reports {\n131: \t\t\tnt.Report(r.Start, r.Duration, r.Error)\n132: \t\t}\n133: \n134: \t\tif t.Active {\n135: \t\t\tactiveTargets[t.Identifier] = []*scrape.Target{nt}\n136: \t\t} else {\n137: \t\t\tdroppedTargets[t.Identifier] = []*scrape.Target{nt}\n138: \t\t}\n139: \t}\n140: \n141: \treturn &testTargetRetriever{\n142: \t\tactiveTargets:  activeTargets,\n143: \t\tdroppedTargets: droppedTargets,\n144: \t}\n145: }\n146: \n147: var scrapeStart = time.Now().Add(-11 * time.Second)\n148: \n149: func (t testTargetRetriever) TargetsActive() map[string][]*scrape.Target {\n150: \treturn t.activeTargets\n151: }\n152: \n153: func (t testTargetRetriever) TargetsDropped() map[string][]*scrape.Target {\n154: \treturn t.droppedTargets\n155: }\n156: \n157: func (t testTargetRetriever) TargetsDroppedCounts() map[string]int {\n158: \tr := make(map[string]int)\n159: \tfor k, v := range t.droppedTargets {\n160: \t\tr[k] = len(v)\n161: \t}\n162: \treturn r\n163: }\n164: \n165: func (t *testTargetRetriever) SetMetadataStoreForTargets(identifier string, metadata scrape.MetricMetadataStore) error {\n166: \ttargets, ok := t.activeTargets[identifier]\n167: \n168: \tif !ok {\n169: \t\treturn errors.New(\"targets not found\")\n170: \t}\n171: \n172: \tfor _, at := range targets {\n173: \t\tat.SetMetadataStore(metadata)\n174: \t}\n175: \n176: \treturn nil\n177: }\n178: \n179: func (t *testTargetRetriever) ResetMetadataStore() {\n180: \tfor _, at := range t.activeTargets {\n181: \t\tfor _, tt := range at {\n182: \t\t\ttt.SetMetadataStore(&testMetaStore{})\n183: \t\t}\n184: \t}\n185: }\n186: \n187: func (t *testTargetRetriever) toFactory() func(context.Context) TargetRetriever {\n188: \treturn func(context.Context) TargetRetriever { return t }\n189: }\n190: \n191: type testAlertmanagerRetriever struct{}\n192: \n193: func (testAlertmanagerRetriever) Alertmanagers() []*url.URL {\n194: \treturn []*url.URL{\n195: \t\t{\n196: \t\t\tScheme: \"http\",\n197: \t\t\tHost:   \"alertmanager.example.com:8080\",\n198: \t\t\tPath:   \"/api/v1/alerts\",\n199: \t\t},\n200: \t}\n201: }\n202: \n203: func (testAlertmanagerRetriever) DroppedAlertmanagers() []*url.URL {\n204: \treturn []*url.URL{\n205: \t\t{\n206: \t\t\tScheme: \"http\",\n207: \t\t\tHost:   \"dropped.alertmanager.example.com:8080\",\n208: \t\t\tPath:   \"/api/v1/alerts\",\n209: \t\t},\n210: \t}\n211: }\n212: \n213: func (t testAlertmanagerRetriever) toFactory() func(context.Context) AlertmanagerRetriever {\n214: \treturn func(context.Context) AlertmanagerRetriever { return t }\n215: }\n216: \n217: type rulesRetrieverMock struct {\n218: \talertingRules []*rules.AlertingRule\n219: \truleGroups    []*rules.Group\n220: \ttesting       *testing.T\n221: }\n222: \n223: func (m *rulesRetrieverMock) CreateAlertingRules() {\n224: \texpr1, err := parser.ParseExpr(`absent(test_metric3) != 1`)\n225: \trequire.NoError(m.testing, err)\n226: \texpr2, err := parser.ParseExpr(`up == 1`)\n227: \trequire.NoError(m.testing, err)\n228: \texpr3, err := parser.ParseExpr(`vector(1)`)\n229: \trequire.NoError(m.testing, err)\n230: \n231: \trule1 := rules.NewAlertingRule(\n232: \t\t\"test_metric3\",\n233: \t\texpr1,\n234: \t\ttime.Second,\n235: \t\t0,\n236: \t\tlabels.Labels{},\n237: \t\tlabels.Labels{},\n238: \t\tlabels.Labels{},\n239: \t\t\"\",\n240: \t\ttrue,\n241: \t\tpromslog.NewNopLogger(),\n242: \t)\n243: \trule2 := rules.NewAlertingRule(\n244: \t\t\"test_metric4\",\n245: \t\texpr2,\n246: \t\ttime.Second,\n247: \t\t0,\n248: \t\tlabels.Labels{},\n249: \t\tlabels.Labels{},\n250: \t\tlabels.Labels{},\n251: \t\t\"\",\n252: \t\ttrue,\n253: \t\tpromslog.NewNopLogger(),\n254: \t)\n255: \trule3 := rules.NewAlertingRule(\n256: \t\t\"test_metric5\",\n257: \t\texpr3,\n258: \t\ttime.Second,\n259: \t\t0,\n260: \t\tlabels.FromStrings(\"name\", \"tm5\"),\n261: \t\tlabels.Labels{},\n262: \t\tlabels.FromStrings(\"name\", \"tm5\"),\n263: \t\t\"\",\n264: \t\tfalse,\n265: \t\tpromslog.NewNopLogger(),\n266: \t)\n267: \trule4 := rules.NewAlertingRule(\n268: \t\t\"test_metric6\",\n269: \t\texpr2,\n270: \t\ttime.Second,\n271: \t\t0,\n272: \t\tlabels.FromStrings(\"testlabel\", \"rule\"),\n273: \t\tlabels.Labels{},\n274: \t\tlabels.Labels{},\n275: \t\t\"\",\n276: \t\ttrue,\n277: \t\tpromslog.NewNopLogger(),\n278: \t)\n279: \trule5 := rules.NewAlertingRule(\n280: \t\t\"test_metric7\",\n281: \t\texpr2,\n282: \t\ttime.Second,\n283: \t\t0,\n284: \t\tlabels.FromStrings(\"templatedlabel\", \"{{ $externalURL }}\"),\n285: \t\tlabels.Labels{},\n286: \t\tlabels.Labels{},\n287: \t\t\"\",\n288: \t\ttrue,\n289: \t\tpromslog.NewNopLogger(),\n290: \t)\n291: \tvar r []*rules.AlertingRule\n292: \tr = append(r, rule1)\n293: \tr = append(r, rule2)\n294: \tr = append(r, rule3)\n295: \tr = append(r, rule4)\n296: \tr = append(r, rule5)\n297: \tm.alertingRules = r\n298: }\n299: \n300: func (m *rulesRetrieverMock) CreateRuleGroups() {\n301: \tm.CreateAlertingRules()\n302: \tarules := m.AlertingRules()\n303: \tstorage := teststorage.New(m.testing)\n304: \tdefer storage.Close()\n305: \n306: \tengineOpts := promql.EngineOpts{\n307: \t\tLogger:     nil,\n308: \t\tReg:        nil,\n309: \t\tMaxSamples: 10,\n310: \t\tTimeout:    100 * time.Second,\n311: \t}\n312: \tengine := promqltest.NewTestEngineWithOpts(m.testing, engineOpts)\n313: \topts := &rules.ManagerOptions{\n314: \t\tQueryFunc:  rules.EngineQueryFunc(engine, storage),\n315: \t\tAppendable: storage,\n316: \t\tContext:    context.Background(),\n317: \t\tLogger:     promslog.NewNopLogger(),\n318: \t\tNotifyFunc: func(context.Context, string, ...*rules.Alert) {},\n319: \t}\n320: \n321: \tvar r []rules.Rule\n322: \n323: \tfor _, alertrule := range arules {\n324: \t\tr = append(r, alertrule)\n325: \t}\n326: \n327: \trecordingExpr, err := parser.ParseExpr(`vector(1)`)\n328: \trequire.NoError(m.testing, err, \"unable to parse alert expression\")\n329: \trecordingRule := rules.NewRecordingRule(\"recording-rule-1\", recordingExpr, labels.Labels{})\n330: \trecordingRule2 := rules.NewRecordingRule(\"recording-rule-2\", recordingExpr, labels.FromStrings(\"testlabel\", \"rule\"))\n331: \tr = append(r, recordingRule)\n332: \tr = append(r, recordingRule2)\n333: \n334: \tgroup := rules.NewGroup(rules.GroupOptions{\n335: \t\tName:          \"grp\",\n336: \t\tFile:          \"/path/to/file\",\n337: \t\tInterval:      time.Second,\n338: \t\tRules:         r,\n339: \t\tShouldRestore: false,\n340: \t\tOpts:          opts,\n341: \t})\n342: \tgroup2 := rules.NewGroup(rules.GroupOptions{\n343: \t\tName:          \"grp2\",\n344: \t\tFile:          \"/path/to/file\",\n345: \t\tInterval:      time.Second,\n346: \t\tRules:         []rules.Rule{r[0]},\n347: \t\tShouldRestore: false,\n348: \t\tOpts:          opts,\n349: \t})\n350: \tm.ruleGroups = []*rules.Group{group, group2}\n351: }\n352: \n353: func (m *rulesRetrieverMock) AlertingRules() []*rules.AlertingRule {\n354: \treturn m.alertingRules\n355: }\n356: \n357: func (m *rulesRetrieverMock) RuleGroups() []*rules.Group {\n358: \treturn m.ruleGroups\n359: }\n360: \n361: func (m *rulesRetrieverMock) toFactory() func(context.Context) RulesRetriever {\n362: \treturn func(context.Context) RulesRetriever { return m }\n363: }\n364: \n365: var samplePrometheusCfg = config.Config{\n366: \tGlobalConfig:       config.GlobalConfig{},\n367: \tAlertingConfig:     config.AlertingConfig{},\n368: \tRuleFiles:          []string{},\n369: \tScrapeConfigs:      []*config.ScrapeConfig{},\n370: \tRemoteWriteConfigs: []*config.RemoteWriteConfig{},\n371: \tRemoteReadConfigs:  []*config.RemoteReadConfig{},\n372: \tOTLPConfig:         config.OTLPConfig{},\n373: }\n374: \n375: var sampleFlagMap = map[string]string{\n376: \t\"flag1\": \"value1\",\n377: \t\"flag2\": \"value2\",\n378: }\n379: \n380: func TestEndpoints(t *testing.T) {\n381: \tstorage := promqltest.LoadedStorage(t, `\n382: \t\tload 1m\n383: \t\t\ttest_metric1{foo=\"bar\"} 0+100x100\n384: \t\t\ttest_metric1{foo=\"boo\"} 1+0x100\n385: \t\t\ttest_metric2{foo=\"boo\"} 1+0x100\n386: \t\t\ttest_metric3{foo=\"bar\", dup=\"1\"} 1+0x100\n387: \t\t\ttest_metric3{foo=\"boo\", dup=\"1\"} 1+0x100\n388: \t\t\ttest_metric4{foo=\"bar\", dup=\"1\"} 1+0x100\n389: \t\t\ttest_metric4{foo=\"boo\", dup=\"1\"} 1+0x100\n390: \t\t\ttest_metric4{foo=\"boo\"} 1+0x100\n391: \t\t\ttest_metric5{\"host.name\"=\"localhost\"} 1+0x100\n392: \t\t\ttest_metric5{\"junk\\n{},=:  chars\"=\"bar\"} 1+0x100\n393: \t`)\n394: \tt.Cleanup(func() { storage.Close() })\n395: \n396: \tstart := time.Unix(0, 0)\n397: \texemplars := []exemplar.QueryResult{\n398: \t\t{\n399: \t\t\tSeriesLabels: labels.FromStrings(\"__name__\", \"test_metric3\", \"foo\", \"boo\", \"dup\", \"1\"),\n400: \t\t\tExemplars: []exemplar.Exemplar{\n401: \t\t\t\t{\n402: \t\t\t\t\tLabels: labels.FromStrings(\"id\", \"abc\"),\n403: \t\t\t\t\tValue:  10,\n404: \t\t\t\t\tTs:     timestamp.FromTime(start.Add(2 * time.Second)),\n405: \t\t\t\t},\n406: \t\t\t},\n407: \t\t},\n408: \t\t{\n409: \t\t\tSeriesLabels: labels.FromStrings(\"__name__\", \"test_metric4\", \"foo\", \"bar\", \"dup\", \"1\"),\n410: \t\t\tExemplars: []exemplar.Exemplar{\n411: \t\t\t\t{\n412: \t\t\t\t\tLabels: labels.FromStrings(\"id\", \"lul\"),\n413: \t\t\t\t\tValue:  10,\n414: \t\t\t\t\tTs:     timestamp.FromTime(start.Add(4 * time.Second)),\n415: \t\t\t\t},\n416: \t\t\t},\n417: \t\t},\n418: \t\t{\n419: \t\t\tSeriesLabels: labels.FromStrings(\"__name__\", \"test_metric3\", \"foo\", \"boo\", \"dup\", \"1\"),\n420: \t\t\tExemplars: []exemplar.Exemplar{\n421: \t\t\t\t{\n422: \t\t\t\t\tLabels: labels.FromStrings(\"id\", \"abc2\"),\n423: \t\t\t\t\tValue:  10,\n424: \t\t\t\t\tTs:     timestamp.FromTime(start.Add(4053 * time.Millisecond)),\n425: \t\t\t\t},\n426: \t\t\t},\n427: \t\t},\n428: \t\t{\n429: \t\t\tSeriesLabels: labels.FromStrings(\"__name__\", \"test_metric4\", \"foo\", \"bar\", \"dup\", \"1\"),\n430: \t\t\tExemplars: []exemplar.Exemplar{\n431: \t\t\t\t{\n432: \t\t\t\t\tLabels: labels.FromStrings(\"id\", \"lul2\"),\n433: \t\t\t\t\tValue:  10,\n434: \t\t\t\t\tTs:     timestamp.FromTime(start.Add(4153 * time.Millisecond)),\n435: \t\t\t\t},\n436: \t\t\t},\n437: \t\t},\n438: \t}\n439: \tfor _, ed := range exemplars {\n440: \t\t_, err := storage.AppendExemplar(0, ed.SeriesLabels, ed.Exemplars[0])\n441: \t\trequire.NoError(t, err, \"failed to add exemplar: %+v\", ed.Exemplars[0])\n442: \t}\n443: \n444: \tnow := time.Now()\n445: \n446: \tng := testEngine(t)\n447: \n448: \tt.Run(\"local\", func(t *testing.T) {\n449: \t\talgr := rulesRetrieverMock{testing: t}\n450: \n451: \t\talgr.CreateAlertingRules()\n452: \t\talgr.CreateRuleGroups()\n453: \n454: \t\tg := algr.RuleGroups()\n455: \t\tg[0].Eval(context.Background(), time.Now())\n456: \n457: \t\ttestTargetRetriever := setupTestTargetRetriever(t)\n458: \n459: \t\tapi := &API{\n460: \t\t\tQueryable:             storage,\n461: \t\t\tQueryEngine:           ng,\n462: \t\t\tExemplarQueryable:     storage.ExemplarQueryable(),\n463: \t\t\ttargetRetriever:       testTargetRetriever.toFactory(),\n464: \t\t\talertmanagerRetriever: testAlertmanagerRetriever{}.toFactory(),\n465: \t\t\tflagsMap:              sampleFlagMap,\n466: \t\t\tnow:                   func() time.Time { return now },\n467: \t\t\tconfig:                func() config.Config { return samplePrometheusCfg },\n468: \t\t\tready:                 func(f http.HandlerFunc) http.HandlerFunc { return f },\n469: \t\t\trulesRetriever:        algr.toFactory(),\n470: \t\t}\n471: \t\ttestEndpoints(t, api, testTargetRetriever, storage, true)\n472: \t})\n473: \n474: \t// Run all the API tests against an API that is wired to forward queries via\n475: \t// the remote read client to a test server, which in turn sends them to the\n476: \t// data from the test storage.\n477: \tt.Run(\"remote\", func(t *testing.T) {\n478: \t\tserver := setupRemote(storage)\n479: \t\tdefer server.Close()\n480: \n481: \t\tu, err := url.Parse(server.URL)\n482: \t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n483: \n484: \t\tal := promslog.NewLevel()\n485: \t\trequire.NoError(t, al.Set(\"debug\"))\n486: \n487: \t\taf := promslog.NewFormat()\n488: \t\trequire.NoError(t, af.Set(\"logfmt\"))\n489: \n490: \t\tpromslogConfig := promslog.Config{\n491: \t\t\tLevel:  al,\n492: \t\t\tFormat: af,\n493: \t\t}\n494: \n495: \t\tdbDir := t.TempDir()\n496: \n497: \t\tremote := remote.NewStorage(promslog.New(&promslogConfig), prometheus.DefaultRegisterer, func() (int64, error) {\n498: \t\t\treturn 0, nil\n499: \t\t}, dbDir, 1*time.Second, nil, false)\n500: \n501: \t\terr = remote.ApplyConfig(&config.Config{\n502: \t\t\tRemoteReadConfigs: []*config.RemoteReadConfig{\n503: \t\t\t\t{\n504: \t\t\t\t\tURL:           &config_util.URL{URL: u},\n505: \t\t\t\t\tRemoteTimeout: model.Duration(1 * time.Second),\n506: \t\t\t\t\tReadRecent:    true,\n507: \t\t\t\t},\n508: \t\t\t},\n509: \t\t})\n510: \t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n511: \n512: \t\talgr := rulesRetrieverMock{testing: t}\n513: \n514: \t\talgr.CreateAlertingRules()\n515: \t\talgr.CreateRuleGroups()\n516: \n517: \t\tg := algr.RuleGroups()\n518: \t\tg[0].Eval(context.Background(), time.Now())\n519: \n520: \t\ttestTargetRetriever := setupTestTargetRetriever(t)\n521: \n522: \t\tapi := &API{\n523: \t\t\tQueryable:             remote,\n524: \t\t\tQueryEngine:           ng,\n525: \t\t\tExemplarQueryable:     storage.ExemplarQueryable(),\n526: \t\t\ttargetRetriever:       testTargetRetriever.toFactory(),\n527: \t\t\talertmanagerRetriever: testAlertmanagerRetriever{}.toFactory(),\n528: \t\t\tflagsMap:              sampleFlagMap,\n529: \t\t\tnow:                   func() time.Time { return now },\n530: \t\t\tconfig:                func() config.Config { return samplePrometheusCfg },\n531: \t\t\tready:                 func(f http.HandlerFunc) http.HandlerFunc { return f },\n532: \t\t\trulesRetriever:        algr.toFactory(),\n533: \t\t}\n534: \t\ttestEndpoints(t, api, testTargetRetriever, storage, false)\n535: \t})\n536: }\n537: \n538: type byLabels []labels.Labels\n539: \n540: func (b byLabels) Len() int           { return len(b) }\n541: func (b byLabels) Swap(i, j int)      { b[i], b[j] = b[j], b[i] }\n542: func (b byLabels) Less(i, j int) bool { return labels.Compare(b[i], b[j]) < 0 }\n543: \n544: func TestGetSeries(t *testing.T) {\n545: \t// TestEndpoints doesn't have enough label names to test api.labelNames\n546: \t// endpoint properly. Hence we test it separately.\n547: \tstorage := promqltest.LoadedStorage(t, `\n548: \t\tload 1m\n549: \t\t\ttest_metric1{foo1=\"bar\", baz=\"abc\"} 0+100x100\n550: \t\t\ttest_metric1{foo2=\"boo\"} 1+0x100\n551: \t\t\ttest_metric2{foo=\"boo\"} 1+0x100\n552: \t\t\ttest_metric2{foo=\"boo\", xyz=\"qwerty\"} 1+0x100\n553: \t\t\ttest_metric2{foo=\"baz\", abc=\"qwerty\"} 1+0x100\n554: \t`)\n555: \tt.Cleanup(func() { storage.Close() })\n556: \tapi := &API{\n557: \t\tQueryable: storage,\n558: \t}\n559: \trequest := func(method string, matchers ...string) (*http.Request, error) {\n560: \t\tu, err := url.Parse(\"http://example.com\")\n561: \t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n562: \t\tq := u.Query()\n563: \t\tfor _, matcher := range matchers {\n564: \t\t\tq.Add(\"match[]\", matcher)\n565: \t\t}\n566: \t\tu.RawQuery = q.Encode()\n567: \n568: \t\tr, err := http.NewRequest(method, u.String(), nil)\n569: \t\tif method == http.MethodPost {\n570: \t\t\tr.Header.Set(\"Content-Type\", \"application/x-www-form-urlencoded\")\n571: \t\t}\n572: \t\treturn r, err\n573: \t}\n574: \n575: \tfor _, tc := range []struct {\n576: \t\tname              string\n577: \t\tapi               *API\n578: \t\tmatchers          []string\n579: \t\texpected          []labels.Labels\n580: \t\texpectedErrorType errorType\n581: \t}{\n582: \t\t{\n583: \t\t\tname:              \"no matchers\",\n584: \t\t\texpectedErrorType: errorBadData,\n585: \t\t\tapi:               api,\n586: \t\t},\n587: \t\t{\n588: \t\t\tname:     \"non empty label matcher\",\n589: \t\t\tmatchers: []string{`{foo=~\".+\"}`},\n590: \t\t\texpected: []labels.Labels{\n591: \t\t\t\tlabels.FromStrings(\"__name__\", \"test_metric2\", \"abc\", \"qwerty\", \"foo\", \"baz\"),\n592: \t\t\t\tlabels.FromStrings(\"__name__\", \"test_metric2\", \"foo\", \"boo\"),\n593: \t\t\t\tlabels.FromStrings(\"__name__\", \"test_metric2\", \"foo\", \"boo\", \"xyz\", \"qwerty\"),\n594: \t\t\t},\n595: \t\t\tapi: api,\n596: \t\t},\n597: \t\t{\n598: \t\t\tname:     \"exact label matcher\",\n599: \t\t\tmatchers: []string{`{foo=\"boo\"}`},\n600: \t\t\texpected: []labels.Labels{\n601: \t\t\t\tlabels.FromStrings(\"__name__\", \"test_metric2\", \"foo\", \"boo\"),\n602: \t\t\t\tlabels.FromStrings(\"__name__\", \"test_metric2\", \"foo\", \"boo\", \"xyz\", \"qwerty\"),\n603: \t\t\t},\n604: \t\t\tapi: api,\n605: \t\t},\n606: \t\t{\n607: \t\t\tname:     \"two matchers\",\n608: \t\t\tmatchers: []string{`{foo=\"boo\"}`, `{foo=\"baz\"}`},\n609: \t\t\texpected: []labels.Labels{\n610: \t\t\t\tlabels.FromStrings(\"__name__\", \"test_metric2\", \"abc\", \"qwerty\", \"foo\", \"baz\"),\n611: \t\t\t\tlabels.FromStrings(\"__name__\", \"test_metric2\", \"foo\", \"boo\"),\n612: \t\t\t\tlabels.FromStrings(\"__name__\", \"test_metric2\", \"foo\", \"boo\", \"xyz\", \"qwerty\"),\n613: \t\t\t},\n614: \t\t\tapi: api,\n615: \t\t},\n616: \t\t{\n617: \t\t\tname:              \"exec error type\",\n618: \t\t\tmatchers:          []string{`{foo=\"boo\"}`, `{foo=\"baz\"}`},\n619: \t\t\texpectedErrorType: errorExec,\n620: \t\t\tapi: &API{\n621: \t\t\t\tQueryable: errorTestQueryable{err: errors.New(\"generic\")},\n622: \t\t\t},\n623: \t\t},\n624: \t\t{\n625: \t\t\tname:              \"storage error type\",\n626: \t\t\tmatchers:          []string{`{foo=\"boo\"}`, `{foo=\"baz\"}`},\n627: \t\t\texpectedErrorType: errorInternal,\n628: \t\t\tapi: &API{\n629: \t\t\t\tQueryable: errorTestQueryable{err: promql.ErrStorage{Err: errors.New(\"generic\")}},\n630: \t\t\t},\n631: \t\t},\n632: \t} {\n633: \t\tt.Run(tc.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n634: \t\t\tctx := context.Background()\n635: \t\t\treq, err := request(http.MethodGet, tc.matchers...)\n636: \t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n637: \t\t\tres := tc.api.series(req.WithContext(ctx))\n638: \t\t\tassertAPIError(t, res.err, tc.expectedErrorType)\n639: \t\t\tif tc.expectedErrorType == errorNone {\n640: \t\t\t\tr := res.data.([]labels.Labels)\n641: \t\t\t\tsort.Sort(byLabels(tc.expected))\n642: \t\t\t\tsort.Sort(byLabels(r))\n643: \t\t\t\ttestutil.RequireEqual(t, tc.expected, r)\n644: \t\t\t}\n645: \t\t})\n646: \t}\n647: }\n648: \n649: func TestQueryExemplars(t *testing.T) {\n650: \tstart := time.Unix(0, 0)\n651: \tstorage := promqltest.LoadedStorage(t, `\n652: \t\tload 1m\n653: \t\t\ttest_metric1{foo=\"bar\"} 0+100x100\n654: \t\t\ttest_metric1{foo=\"boo\"} 1+0x100\n655: \t\t\ttest_metric2{foo=\"boo\"} 1+0x100\n656: \t\t\ttest_metric3{foo=\"bar\", dup=\"1\"} 1+0x100\n657: \t\t\ttest_metric3{foo=\"boo\", dup=\"1\"} 1+0x100\n658: \t\t\ttest_metric4{foo=\"bar\", dup=\"1\"} 1+0x100\n659: \t\t\ttest_metric4{foo=\"boo\", dup=\"1\"} 1+0x100\n660: \t\t\ttest_metric4{foo=\"boo\"} 1+0x100\n661: \t`)\n662: \tt.Cleanup(func() { storage.Close() })\n663: \n664: \tapi := &API{\n665: \t\tQueryable:         storage,\n666: \t\tQueryEngine:       testEngine(t),\n667: \t\tExemplarQueryable: storage.ExemplarQueryable(),\n668: \t}\n669: \n670: \trequest := func(method string, qs url.Values) (*http.Request, error) {\n671: \t\tu, err := url.Parse(\"http://example.com\")\n672: \t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n673: \t\tu.RawQuery = qs.Encode()\n674: \t\tr, err := http.NewRequest(method, u.String(), nil)\n675: \t\tif method == http.MethodPost {\n676: \t\t\tr.Header.Set(\"Content-Type\", \"application/x-www-form-urlencoded\")\n677: \t\t}\n678: \t\treturn r, err\n679: \t}\n680: \n681: \tfor _, tc := range []struct {\n682: \t\tname              string\n683: \t\tquery             url.Values\n684: \t\texemplars         []exemplar.QueryResult\n685: \t\tapi               *API\n686: \t\texpectedErrorType errorType\n687: \t}{\n688: \t\t{\n689: \t\t\tname: \"no error\",\n690: \t\t\tapi:  api,\n691: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n692: \t\t\t\t\"query\": []string{`test_metric3{foo=\"boo\"} - test_metric4{foo=\"bar\"}`},\n693: \t\t\t\t\"start\": []string{\"0\"},\n694: \t\t\t\t\"end\":   []string{\"4\"},\n695: \t\t\t},\n696: \t\t\texemplars: []exemplar.QueryResult{\n697: \t\t\t\t{\n698: \t\t\t\t\tSeriesLabels: labels.FromStrings(\"__name__\", \"test_metric3\", \"foo\", \"boo\", \"dup\", \"1\"),\n699: \t\t\t\t\tExemplars: []exemplar.Exemplar{\n700: \t\t\t\t\t\t{\n701: \t\t\t\t\t\t\tLabels: labels.FromStrings(\"id\", \"abc\"),\n702: \t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:  10,\n703: \t\t\t\t\t\t\tTs:     timestamp.FromTime(start.Add(0 * time.Second)),\n704: \t\t\t\t\t\t},\n705: \t\t\t\t\t},\n706: \t\t\t\t},\n707: \t\t\t\t{\n708: \t\t\t\t\tSeriesLabels: labels.FromStrings(\"__name__\", \"test_metric4\", \"foo\", \"bar\", \"dup\", \"1\"),\n709: \t\t\t\t\tExemplars: []exemplar.Exemplar{\n710: \t\t\t\t\t\t{\n711: \t\t\t\t\t\t\tLabels: labels.FromStrings(\"id\", \"lul\"),\n712: \t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:  10,\n713: \t\t\t\t\t\t\tTs:     timestamp.FromTime(start.Add(3 * time.Second)),\n714: \t\t\t\t\t\t},\n715: \t\t\t\t\t},\n716: \t\t\t\t},\n717: \t\t\t},\n718: \t\t},\n719: \t\t{\n720: \t\t\tname:              \"should return errorExec upon genetic error\",\n721: \t\t\texpectedErrorType: errorExec,\n722: \t\t\tapi: &API{\n723: \t\t\t\tExemplarQueryable: errorTestQueryable{err: errors.New(\"generic\")},\n724: \t\t\t},\n725: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n726: \t\t\t\t\"query\": []string{`test_metric3{foo=\"boo\"} - test_metric4{foo=\"bar\"}`},\n727: \t\t\t\t\"start\": []string{\"0\"},\n728: \t\t\t\t\"end\":   []string{\"4\"},\n729: \t\t\t},\n730: \t\t},\n731: \t\t{\n732: \t\t\tname:              \"should return errorInternal err type is ErrStorage\",\n733: \t\t\texpectedErrorType: errorInternal,\n734: \t\t\tapi: &API{\n735: \t\t\t\tExemplarQueryable: errorTestQueryable{err: promql.ErrStorage{Err: errors.New(\"generic\")}},\n736: \t\t\t},\n737: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n738: \t\t\t\t\"query\": []string{`test_metric3{foo=\"boo\"} - test_metric4{foo=\"bar\"}`},\n739: \t\t\t\t\"start\": []string{\"0\"},\n740: \t\t\t\t\"end\":   []string{\"4\"},\n741: \t\t\t},\n742: \t\t},\n743: \t} {\n744: \t\tt.Run(tc.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n745: \t\t\tes := storage\n746: \t\t\tctx := context.Background()\n747: \n748: \t\t\tfor _, te := range tc.exemplars {\n749: \t\t\t\tfor _, e := range te.Exemplars {\n750: \t\t\t\t\t_, err := es.AppendExemplar(0, te.SeriesLabels, e)\n751: \t\t\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n752: \t\t\t\t}\n753: \t\t\t}\n754: \n755: \t\t\treq, err := request(http.MethodGet, tc.query)\n756: \t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n757: \t\t\tres := tc.api.queryExemplars(req.WithContext(ctx))\n758: \t\t\tassertAPIError(t, res.err, tc.expectedErrorType)\n759: \n760: \t\t\tif tc.expectedErrorType == errorNone {\n761: \t\t\t\tassertAPIResponse(t, res.data, tc.exemplars)\n762: \t\t\t}\n763: \t\t})\n764: \t}\n765: }\n766: \n767: func TestLabelNames(t *testing.T) {\n768: \t// TestEndpoints doesn't have enough label names to test api.labelNames\n769: \t// endpoint properly. Hence we test it separately.\n770: \tstorage := promqltest.LoadedStorage(t, `\n771: \t\tload 1m\n772: \t\t\ttest_metric1{foo1=\"bar\", baz=\"abc\"} 0+100x100\n773: \t\t\ttest_metric1{foo2=\"boo\"} 1+0x100\n774: \t\t\ttest_metric2{foo=\"boo\"} 1+0x100\n775: \t\t\ttest_metric2{foo=\"boo\", xyz=\"qwerty\"} 1+0x100\n776: \t\t\ttest_metric2{foo=\"baz\", abc=\"qwerty\"} 1+0x100\n777: \t`)\n778: \tt.Cleanup(func() { storage.Close() })\n779: \tapi := &API{\n780: \t\tQueryable: storage,\n781: \t}\n782: \trequest := func(method, limit string, matchers ...string) (*http.Request, error) {\n783: \t\tu, err := url.Parse(\"http://example.com\")\n784: \t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n785: \t\tq := u.Query()\n786: \t\tfor _, matcher := range matchers {\n787: \t\t\tq.Add(\"match[]\", matcher)\n788: \t\t}\n789: \t\tif limit != \"\" {\n790: \t\t\tq.Add(\"limit\", limit)\n791: \t\t}\n792: \t\tu.RawQuery = q.Encode()\n793: \n794: \t\tr, err := http.NewRequest(method, u.String(), nil)\n795: \t\tif method == http.MethodPost {\n796: \t\t\tr.Header.Set(\"Content-Type\", \"application/x-www-form-urlencoded\")\n797: \t\t}\n798: \t\treturn r, err\n799: \t}\n800: \n801: \tfor _, tc := range []struct {\n802: \t\tname              string\n803: \t\tapi               *API\n804: \t\tmatchers          []string\n805: \t\tlimit             string\n806: \t\texpected          []string\n807: \t\texpectedErrorType errorType\n808: \t}{\n809: \t\t{\n810: \t\t\tname:     \"no matchers\",\n811: \t\t\texpected: []string{\"__name__\", \"abc\", \"baz\", \"foo\", \"foo1\", \"foo2\", \"xyz\"},\n812: \t\t\tapi:      api,\n813: \t\t},\n814: \t\t{\n815: \t\t\tname:     \"non empty label matcher\",\n816: \t\t\tmatchers: []string{`{foo=~\".+\"}`},\n817: \t\t\texpected: []string{\"__name__\", \"abc\", \"foo\", \"xyz\"},\n818: \t\t\tapi:      api,\n819: \t\t},\n820: \t\t{\n821: \t\t\tname:     \"non empty label matcher with limit\",\n822: \t\t\tmatchers: []string{`{foo=~\".+\"}`},\n823: \t\t\texpected: []string{\"__name__\", \"abc\"},\n824: \t\t\tlimit:    \"2\",\n825: \t\t\tapi:      api,\n826: \t\t},\n827: \t\t{\n828: \t\t\tname:     \"exact label matcher\",\n829: \t\t\tmatchers: []string{`{foo=\"boo\"}`},\n830: \t\t\texpected: []string{\"__name__\", \"foo\", \"xyz\"},\n831: \t\t\tapi:      api,\n832: \t\t},\n833: \t\t{\n834: \t\t\tname:     \"two matchers\",\n835: \t\t\tmatchers: []string{`{foo=\"boo\"}`, `{foo=\"baz\"}`},\n836: \t\t\texpected: []string{\"__name__\", \"abc\", \"foo\", \"xyz\"},\n837: \t\t\tapi:      api,\n838: \t\t},\n839: \t\t{\n840: \t\t\tname:              \"exec error type\",\n841: \t\t\tmatchers:          []string{`{foo=\"boo\"}`, `{foo=\"baz\"}`},\n842: \t\t\texpectedErrorType: errorExec,\n843: \t\t\tapi: &API{\n844: \t\t\t\tQueryable: errorTestQueryable{err: errors.New(\"generic\")},\n845: \t\t\t},\n846: \t\t},\n847: \t\t{\n848: \t\t\tname:              \"storage error type\",\n849: \t\t\tmatchers:          []string{`{foo=\"boo\"}`, `{foo=\"baz\"}`},\n850: \t\t\texpectedErrorType: errorInternal,\n851: \t\t\tapi: &API{\n852: \t\t\t\tQueryable: errorTestQueryable{err: promql.ErrStorage{Err: errors.New(\"generic\")}},\n853: \t\t\t},\n854: \t\t},\n855: \t} {\n856: \t\tt.Run(tc.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n857: \t\t\tfor _, method := range []string{http.MethodGet, http.MethodPost} {\n858: \t\t\t\tctx := context.Background()\n859: \t\t\t\treq, err := request(method, tc.limit, tc.matchers...)\n860: \t\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n861: \t\t\t\tres := tc.api.labelNames(req.WithContext(ctx))\n862: \t\t\t\tassertAPIError(t, res.err, tc.expectedErrorType)\n863: \t\t\t\tif tc.expectedErrorType == errorNone {\n864: \t\t\t\t\tassertAPIResponse(t, res.data, tc.expected)\n865: \t\t\t\t}\n866: \t\t\t}\n867: \t\t})\n868: \t}\n869: }\n870: \n871: type testStats struct {\n872: \tCustom string `json:\"custom\"`\n873: }\n874: \n875: func (testStats) Builtin() (_ stats.BuiltinStats) {\n876: \treturn\n877: }\n878: \n879: func TestStats(t *testing.T) {\n880: \tstorage := teststorage.New(t)\n881: \tt.Cleanup(func() { storage.Close() })\n882: \n883: \tapi := &API{\n884: \t\tQueryable:   storage,\n885: \t\tQueryEngine: testEngine(t),\n886: \t\tnow: func() time.Time {\n887: \t\t\treturn time.Unix(123, 0)\n888: \t\t},\n889: \t}\n890: \trequest := func(method, param string) (*http.Request, error) {\n891: \t\tu, err := url.Parse(\"http://example.com\")\n892: \t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n893: \t\tq := u.Query()\n894: \t\tq.Add(\"stats\", param)\n895: \t\tq.Add(\"query\", \"up\")\n896: \t\tq.Add(\"start\", \"0\")\n897: \t\tq.Add(\"end\", \"100\")\n898: \t\tq.Add(\"step\", \"10\")\n899: \t\tu.RawQuery = q.Encode()\n900: \n901: \t\tr, err := http.NewRequest(method, u.String(), nil)\n902: \t\tif method == http.MethodPost {\n903: \t\t\tr.Header.Set(\"Content-Type\", \"application/x-www-form-urlencoded\")\n904: \t\t}\n905: \t\treturn r, err\n906: \t}\n907: \n908: \tfor _, tc := range []struct {\n909: \t\tname     string\n910: \t\trenderer StatsRenderer\n911: \t\tparam    string\n912: \t\texpected func(*testing.T, any)\n913: \t}{\n914: \t\t{\n915: \t\t\tname:  \"stats is blank\",\n916: \t\t\tparam: \"\",\n917: \t\t\texpected: func(t *testing.T, i any) {\n918: \t\t\t\trequire.IsType(t, &QueryData{}, i)\n919: \t\t\t\tqd := i.(*QueryData)\n920: \t\t\t\trequire.Nil(t, qd.Stats)\n921: \t\t\t},\n922: \t\t},\n923: \t\t{\n924: \t\t\tname:  \"stats is true\",\n925: \t\t\tparam: \"true\",\n926: \t\t\texpected: func(t *testing.T, i any) {\n927: \t\t\t\trequire.IsType(t, &QueryData{}, i)\n928: \t\t\t\tqd := i.(*QueryData)\n929: \t\t\t\trequire.NotNil(t, qd.Stats)\n930: \t\t\t\tqs := qd.Stats.Builtin()\n931: \t\t\t\trequire.NotNil(t, qs.Timings)\n932: \t\t\t\trequire.Greater(t, qs.Timings.EvalTotalTime, float64(0))\n933: \t\t\t\trequire.NotNil(t, qs.Samples)\n934: \t\t\t\trequire.NotNil(t, qs.Samples.TotalQueryableSamples)\n935: \t\t\t\trequire.Nil(t, qs.Samples.TotalQueryableSamplesPerStep)\n936: \t\t\t},\n937: \t\t},\n938: \t\t{\n939: \t\t\tname:  \"stats is all\",\n940: \t\t\tparam: \"all\",\n941: \t\t\texpected: func(t *testing.T, i any) {\n942: \t\t\t\trequire.IsType(t, &QueryData{}, i)\n943: \t\t\t\tqd := i.(*QueryData)\n944: \t\t\t\trequire.NotNil(t, qd.Stats)\n945: \t\t\t\tqs := qd.Stats.Builtin()\n946: \t\t\t\trequire.NotNil(t, qs.Timings)\n947: \t\t\t\trequire.Greater(t, qs.Timings.EvalTotalTime, float64(0))\n948: \t\t\t\trequire.NotNil(t, qs.Samples)\n949: \t\t\t\trequire.NotNil(t, qs.Samples.TotalQueryableSamples)\n950: \t\t\t\trequire.NotNil(t, qs.Samples.TotalQueryableSamplesPerStep)\n951: \t\t\t},\n952: \t\t},\n953: \t\t{\n954: \t\t\tname: \"custom handler with known value\",\n955: \t\t\trenderer: func(_ context.Context, _ *stats.Statistics, p string) stats.QueryStats {\n956: \t\t\t\tif p == \"known\" {\n957: \t\t\t\t\treturn testStats{\"Custom Value\"}\n958: \t\t\t\t}\n959: \t\t\t\treturn nil\n960: \t\t\t},\n961: \t\t\tparam: \"known\",\n962: \t\t\texpected: func(t *testing.T, i any) {\n963: \t\t\t\trequire.IsType(t, &QueryData{}, i)\n964: \t\t\t\tqd := i.(*QueryData)\n965: \t\t\t\trequire.NotNil(t, qd.Stats)\n966: \t\t\t\tjson := jsoniter.ConfigCompatibleWithStandardLibrary\n967: \t\t\t\tj, err := json.Marshal(qd.Stats)\n968: \t\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n969: \t\t\t\trequire.JSONEq(t, `{\"custom\":\"Custom Value\"}`, string(j))\n970: \t\t\t},\n971: \t\t},\n972: \t} {\n973: \t\tt.Run(tc.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n974: \t\t\tbefore := api.statsRenderer\n975: \t\t\tdefer func() { api.statsRenderer = before }()\n976: \t\t\tapi.statsRenderer = tc.renderer\n977: \n978: \t\t\tfor _, method := range []string{http.MethodGet, http.MethodPost} {\n979: \t\t\t\tctx := context.Background()\n980: \t\t\t\treq, err := request(method, tc.param)\n981: \t\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n982: \t\t\t\tres := api.query(req.WithContext(ctx))\n983: \t\t\t\tassertAPIError(t, res.err, errorNone)\n984: \t\t\t\ttc.expected(t, res.data)\n985: \n986: \t\t\t\tres = api.queryRange(req.WithContext(ctx))\n987: \t\t\t\tassertAPIError(t, res.err, errorNone)\n988: \t\t\t\ttc.expected(t, res.data)\n989: \t\t\t}\n990: \t\t})\n991: \t}\n992: }\n993: \n994: func setupTestTargetRetriever(t *testing.T) *testTargetRetriever {\n995: \tt.Helper()\n996: \n997: \ttargets := []*testTargetParams{\n998: \t\t{\n999: \t\t\tIdentifier: \"test\",\n1000: \t\t\tLabels: labels.FromMap(map[string]string{\n1001: \t\t\t\tmodel.SchemeLabel:         \"http\",\n1002: \t\t\t\tmodel.AddressLabel:        \"example.com:8080\",\n1003: \t\t\t\tmodel.MetricsPathLabel:    \"/metrics\",\n1004: \t\t\t\tmodel.JobLabel:            \"test\",\n1005: \t\t\t\tmodel.ScrapeIntervalLabel: \"15s\",\n1006: \t\t\t\tmodel.ScrapeTimeoutLabel:  \"5s\",\n1007: \t\t\t}),\n1008: \t\t\tParams:  url.Values{},\n1009: \t\t\tReports: []*testReport{{scrapeStart, 70 * time.Millisecond, nil}},\n1010: \t\t\tActive:  true,\n1011: \t\t},\n1012: \t\t{\n1013: \t\t\tIdentifier: \"blackbox\",\n1014: \t\t\tLabels: labels.FromMap(map[string]string{\n1015: \t\t\t\tmodel.SchemeLabel:         \"http\",\n1016: \t\t\t\tmodel.AddressLabel:        \"localhost:9115\",\n1017: \t\t\t\tmodel.MetricsPathLabel:    \"/probe\",\n1018: \t\t\t\tmodel.JobLabel:            \"blackbox\",\n1019: \t\t\t\tmodel.ScrapeIntervalLabel: \"20s\",\n1020: \t\t\t\tmodel.ScrapeTimeoutLabel:  \"10s\",\n1021: \t\t\t}),\n1022: \t\t\tParams:  url.Values{\"target\": []string{\"example.com\"}},\n1023: \t\t\tReports: []*testReport{{scrapeStart, 100 * time.Millisecond, errors.New(\"failed\")}},\n1024: \t\t\tActive:  true,\n1025: \t\t},\n1026: \t\t{\n1027: \t\t\tIdentifier: \"blackbox\",\n1028: \t\t\tLabels:     labels.EmptyLabels(),\n1029: \t\t\ttargetLabels: model.LabelSet{\n1030: \t\t\t\tmodel.SchemeLabel:         \"http\",\n1031: \t\t\t\tmodel.AddressLabel:        \"http://dropped.example.com:9115\",\n1032: \t\t\t\tmodel.MetricsPathLabel:    \"/probe\",\n1033: \t\t\t\tmodel.JobLabel:            \"blackbox\",\n1034: \t\t\t\tmodel.ScrapeIntervalLabel: \"30s\",\n1035: \t\t\t\tmodel.ScrapeTimeoutLabel:  \"15s\",\n1036: \t\t\t},\n1037: \t\t\tParams: url.Values{},\n1038: \t\t\tActive: false,\n1039: \t\t},\n1040: \t}\n1041: \n1042: \treturn newTestTargetRetriever(targets)\n1043: }\n1044: \n1045: func setupRemote(s storage.Storage) *httptest.Server {\n1046: \thandler := http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n1047: \t\treq, err := remote.DecodeReadRequest(r)\n1048: \t\tif err != nil {\n1049: \t\t\thttp.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusBadRequest)\n1050: \t\t\treturn\n1051: \t\t}\n1052: \t\tresp := prompb.ReadResponse{\n1053: \t\t\tResults: make([]*prompb.QueryResult, len(req.Queries)),\n1054: \t\t}\n1055: \t\tfor i, query := range req.Queries {\n1056: \t\t\tmatchers, err := remote.FromLabelMatchers(query.Matchers)\n1057: \t\t\tif err != nil {\n1058: \t\t\t\thttp.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusBadRequest)\n1059: \t\t\t\treturn\n1060: \t\t\t}\n1061: \n1062: \t\t\tvar hints *storage.SelectHints\n1063: \t\t\tif query.Hints != nil {\n1064: \t\t\t\thints = &storage.SelectHints{\n1065: \t\t\t\t\tStart: query.Hints.StartMs,\n1066: \t\t\t\t\tEnd:   query.Hints.EndMs,\n1067: \t\t\t\t\tStep:  query.Hints.StepMs,\n1068: \t\t\t\t\tFunc:  query.Hints.Func,\n1069: \t\t\t\t}\n1070: \t\t\t}\n1071: \n1072: \t\t\tquerier, err := s.Querier(query.StartTimestampMs, query.EndTimestampMs)\n1073: \t\t\tif err != nil {\n1074: \t\t\t\thttp.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)\n1075: \t\t\t\treturn\n1076: \t\t\t}\n1077: \t\t\tdefer querier.Close()\n1078: \n1079: \t\t\tset := querier.Select(r.Context(), false, hints, matchers...)\n1080: \t\t\tresp.Results[i], _, err = remote.ToQueryResult(set, 1e6)\n1081: \t\t\tif err != nil {\n1082: \t\t\t\thttp.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)\n1083: \t\t\t\treturn\n1084: \t\t\t}\n1085: \t\t}\n1086: \n1087: \t\tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Type\", \"application/x-protobuf\")\n1088: \t\tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Encoding\", \"snappy\")\n1089: \n1090: \t\tif err := remote.EncodeReadResponse(&resp, w); err != nil {\n1091: \t\t\thttp.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)\n1092: \t\t\treturn\n1093: \t\t}\n1094: \t})\n1095: \n1096: \treturn httptest.NewServer(handler)\n1097: }\n1098: \n1099: func testEndpoints(t *testing.T, api *API, tr *testTargetRetriever, es storage.ExemplarStorage, testLabelAPI bool) {\n1100: \tstart := time.Unix(0, 0)\n1101: \n1102: \ttype targetMetadata struct {\n1103: \t\tidentifier string\n1104: \t\tmetadata   []scrape.MetricMetadata\n1105: \t}\n1106: \n1107: \ttype test struct {\n1108: \t\tendpoint              apiFunc\n1109: \t\tparams                map[string]string\n1110: \t\tquery                 url.Values\n1111: \t\tresponse              any\n1112: \t\tresponseLen           int // If nonzero, check only the length; `response` is ignored.\n1113: \t\tresponseMetadataTotal int\n1114: \t\tresponseAsJSON        string\n1115: \t\twarningsCount         int\n1116: \t\terrType               errorType\n1117: \t\tsorter                func(any)\n1118: \t\tmetadata              []targetMetadata\n1119: \t\texemplars             []exemplar.QueryResult\n1120: \t\tzeroFunc              func(any)\n1121: \t}\n1122: \n1123: \trulesZeroFunc := func(i any) {\n1124: \t\tif i != nil {\n1125: \t\t\tv := i.(*RuleDiscovery)\n1126: \t\t\tfor _, ruleGroup := range v.RuleGroups {\n1127: \t\t\t\truleGroup.EvaluationTime = float64(0)\n1128: \t\t\t\truleGroup.LastEvaluation = time.Time{}\n1129: \t\t\t\tfor k, rule := range ruleGroup.Rules {\n1130: \t\t\t\t\tswitch r := rule.(type) {\n1131: \t\t\t\t\tcase AlertingRule:\n1132: \t\t\t\t\t\tr.LastEvaluation = time.Time{}\n1133: \t\t\t\t\t\tr.EvaluationTime = float64(0)\n1134: \t\t\t\t\t\tr.LastError = \"\"\n1135: \t\t\t\t\t\tr.Health = \"ok\"\n1136: \t\t\t\t\t\tfor _, alert := range r.Alerts {\n1137: \t\t\t\t\t\t\talert.ActiveAt = nil\n1138: \t\t\t\t\t\t}\n1139: \t\t\t\t\t\truleGroup.Rules[k] = r\n1140: \t\t\t\t\tcase RecordingRule:\n1141: \t\t\t\t\t\tr.LastEvaluation = time.Time{}\n1142: \t\t\t\t\t\tr.EvaluationTime = float64(0)\n1143: \t\t\t\t\t\tr.LastError = \"\"\n1144: \t\t\t\t\t\tr.Health = \"ok\"\n1145: \t\t\t\t\t\truleGroup.Rules[k] = r\n1146: \t\t\t\t\t}\n1147: \t\t\t\t}\n1148: \t\t\t}\n1149: \t\t}\n1150: \t}\n1151: \n1152: \ttests := []test{\n1153: \t\t{\n1154: \t\t\tendpoint: api.query,\n1155: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n1156: \t\t\t\t\"query\": []string{\"2\"},\n1157: \t\t\t\t\"time\":  []string{\"123.4\"},\n1158: \t\t\t},\n1159: \t\t\tresponse: &QueryData{\n1160: \t\t\t\tResultType: parser.ValueTypeScalar,\n1161: \t\t\t\tResult: promql.Scalar{\n1162: \t\t\t\t\tV: 2,\n1163: \t\t\t\t\tT: timestamp.FromTime(start.Add(123*time.Second + 400*time.Millisecond)),\n1164: \t\t\t\t},\n1165: \t\t\t},\n1166: \t\t},\n1167: \t\t// Only matrix and vector responses are limited/truncated. String and scalar responses aren't truncated.\n1168: \t\t{\n1169: \t\t\tendpoint: api.query,\n1170: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n1171: \t\t\t\t\"query\": []string{\"2\"},\n1172: \t\t\t\t\"time\":  []string{\"123.4\"},\n1173: \t\t\t\t\"limit\": []string{\"1\"},\n1174: \t\t\t},\n1175: \t\t\tresponse: &QueryData{\n1176: \t\t\t\tResultType: parser.ValueTypeScalar,\n1177: \t\t\t\tResult: promql.Scalar{\n1178: \t\t\t\t\tV: 2,\n1179: \t\t\t\t\tT: timestamp.FromTime(start.Add(123*time.Second + 400*time.Millisecond)),\n1180: \t\t\t\t},\n1181: \t\t\t},\n1182: \t\t\twarningsCount: 0,\n1183: \t\t},\n1184: \t\t// When limit = 0, limit is disabled.\n1185: \t\t{\n1186: \t\t\tendpoint: api.query,\n1187: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n1188: \t\t\t\t\"query\": []string{\"2\"},\n1189: \t\t\t\t\"time\":  []string{\"123.4\"},\n1190: \t\t\t\t\"limit\": []string{\"0\"},\n1191: \t\t\t},\n1192: \t\t\tresponse: &QueryData{\n1193: \t\t\t\tResultType: parser.ValueTypeScalar,\n1194: \t\t\t\tResult: promql.Scalar{\n1195: \t\t\t\t\tV: 2,\n1196: \t\t\t\t\tT: timestamp.FromTime(start.Add(123*time.Second + 400*time.Millisecond)),\n1197: \t\t\t\t},\n1198: \t\t\t},\n1199: \t\t\twarningsCount: 0,\n1200: \t\t},\n1201: \t\t{\n1202: \t\t\tendpoint: api.query,\n1203: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n1204: \t\t\t\t\"query\": []string{\"2\"},\n1205: \t\t\t\t\"time\":  []string{\"123.4\"},\n1206: \t\t\t\t\"limit\": []string{\"-1\"},\n1207: \t\t\t},\n1208: \t\t\terrType: errorBadData,\n1209: \t\t},\n1210: \t\t{\n1211: \t\t\tendpoint: api.query,\n1212: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n1213: \t\t\t\t\"query\": []string{\"0.333\"},\n1214: \t\t\t\t\"time\":  []string{\"1970-01-01T00:02:03Z\"},\n1215: \t\t\t},\n1216: \t\t\tresponse: &QueryData{\n1217: \t\t\t\tResultType: parser.ValueTypeScalar,\n1218: \t\t\t\tResult: promql.Scalar{\n1219: \t\t\t\t\tV: 0.333,\n1220: \t\t\t\t\tT: timestamp.FromTime(start.Add(123 * time.Second)),\n1221: \t\t\t\t},\n1222: \t\t\t},\n1223: \t\t},\n1224: \t\t{\n1225: \t\t\tendpoint: api.query,\n1226: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n1227: \t\t\t\t\"query\": []string{\"0.333\"},\n1228: \t\t\t\t\"time\":  []string{\"1970-01-01T01:02:03+01:00\"},\n1229: \t\t\t},\n1230: \t\t\tresponse: &QueryData{\n1231: \t\t\t\tResultType: parser.ValueTypeScalar,\n1232: \t\t\t\tResult: promql.Scalar{\n1233: \t\t\t\t\tV: 0.333,\n1234: \t\t\t\t\tT: timestamp.FromTime(start.Add(123 * time.Second)),\n1235: \t\t\t\t},\n1236: \t\t\t},\n1237: \t\t},\n1238: \t\t{\n1239: \t\t\tendpoint: api.query,\n1240: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n1241: \t\t\t\t\"query\": []string{\"0.333\"},\n1242: \t\t\t},\n1243: \t\t\tresponse: &QueryData{\n1244: \t\t\t\tResultType: parser.ValueTypeScalar,\n1245: \t\t\t\tResult: promql.Scalar{\n1246: \t\t\t\t\tV: 0.333,\n1247: \t\t\t\t\tT: timestamp.FromTime(api.now()),\n1248: \t\t\t\t},\n1249: \t\t\t},\n1250: \t\t},\n1251: \t\t{\n1252: \t\t\tendpoint: api.query,\n1253: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n1254: \t\t\t\t\"query\": []string{\n1255: \t\t\t\t\t`label_replace(vector(42), \"foo\", \"bar\", \"\", \"\") or label_replace(vector(3.1415), \"dings\", \"bums\", \"\", \"\")`,\n1256: \t\t\t\t},\n1257: \t\t\t\t\"time\":  []string{\"123.4\"},\n1258: \t\t\t\t\"limit\": []string{\"2\"},\n1259: \t\t\t},\n1260: \t\t\twarningsCount: 0,\n1261: \t\t\tresponseAsJSON: `{\n1262: \t\t\"resultType\": \"vector\",\n1263: \t\t\"result\": [\n1264: \t\t\t{\n1265: \t\t\t\t\"metric\": {\n1266: \t\t\t\t\t\"foo\": \"bar\"\n1267: \t\t\t\t},\n1268: \t\t\t\t\"value\": [123.4, \"42\"]\n1269: \t\t\t},\n1270: \t\t\t{\n1271: \t\t\t\t\"metric\": {\n1272: \t\t\t\t\t\"dings\": \"bums\"\n1273: \t\t\t\t},\n1274: \t\t\t\t\"value\": [123.4, \"3.1415\"]\n1275: \t\t\t}\n1276: \t\t]\n1277: \t}`,\n1278: \t\t},\n1279: \t\t{\n1280: \t\t\tendpoint: api.query,\n1281: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n1282: \t\t\t\t\"query\": []string{\n1283: \t\t\t\t\t`label_replace(vector(42), \"foo\", \"bar\", \"\", \"\") or label_replace(vector(3.1415), \"dings\", \"bums\", \"\", \"\")`,\n1284: \t\t\t\t},\n1285: \t\t\t\t\"time\":  []string{\"123.4\"},\n1286: \t\t\t\t\"limit\": []string{\"1\"},\n1287: \t\t\t},\n1288: \t\t\twarningsCount: 1,\n1289: \t\t\tresponseAsJSON: `{\n1290: \t\t\"resultType\": \"vector\",\n1291: \t\t\"result\": [\n1292: \t\t\t{\n1293: \t\t\tendpoint: api.query,\n1303: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n1304: \t\t\t\t\"query\": []string{\n1305: \t\t\t\t\t`label_replace(vector(42), \"foo\", \"bar\", \"\", \"\") or label_replace(vector(3.1415), \"dings\", \"bums\", \"\", \"\")`,\n1306: \t\t\t\t},\n1307: \t\t\t\t\"time\":  []string{\"123.4\"},\n1308: \t\t\t\t\"limit\": []string{\"0\"},\n1309: \t\t\t},\n1310: \t\t\tresponseAsJSON: `{\n1311: \t\t\"resultType\": \"vector\",\n1312: \t\t\"result\": [\n1313: \t\t\t{\n1314: \t\t\t\t\"metric\": {\n1315: \t\t\t\t\t\"foo\": \"bar\"\n1316: \t\t\t\t},\n1317: \"3.1415\"]\n1324: \t\t\t}\n1325: \t\t]\n1326: \t}`,\n1327: \t\t\twarningsCount: 0,\n1328: \t\t},\n1329: \t\t// limit=0 means no limit.\n1330: \t\t{\n1331: \t\t\tendpoint: api.queryRange,\n1332: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n1333: \t\t\t\t\"query\": []string{\n1334: \t\t\t\t\t`label_replace(vector(42), \"foo\", \"bar\", \"\", \"\") or label_replace(vector(3.1415), \"dings\", \"bums\", \"\", []string{\"0\"},\n1340: \t\t\t},\n1341: \t\t\tresponse: &QueryData{\n1342: \t\t\t\tResultType: parser.ValueTypeMatrix,\n1343: \t\t\t\tResult: promql.Matrix{\n1344: \t\t\t\t\tpromql.Series{\n1345: `{\"resultType\":\"vector\",\"result\":[]}`,\n1452: \t\t},\n1453: \t\t{\n1454: \t\t\tendpoint: api.queryRange,\n1455: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n1456: \t\t\t\t\"query\": []string{\"bottomk(2, \t\t\t},\n1501: \t\t\terrType: errorBadData,\n1502: \t\t},\n1503: \t\t// Bad query expression.\n1504: \t\t{\n1505: \t\t\tendpoint: api.query,\n1506: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n1507: \t\t\t\t\"query\": \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n1526: \t\t\t\t\"query\": []string{\"time()\"},\n1527: \t\t\t\t\"start\": []string{\"1\"},\n1528: \t\t\t\t\"end\":   []string{\"2\"},\n1529: \t\t\t\t\"step\":  []string{\"0\"},\n1530: \t\t\t},\n1531: \t\t\terrType: errorBadData,\n1532: \t\t},\n1533: \t\t// Start after end.\n1534: \t\t{\n1535: \t\t\tendpoint: api.queryRange,\n1536: \t\t\tquery: \t\t\t},\n1542: \t\t\terrType: errorBadData,\n1543: \t\t},\n1544: \t\t// Start overflows int64 internally.\n1545: \t\t{\n1546: \t\t\tendpoint: api.queryRange,\n1547: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n1548: \t\t\t\t\"query\": []string{\"time()\"},\n1549: \t\t\t\t\"start\": []string{\"148966367200.372\"},\n1550: \t\t\t\t\"end\":   []string{\"1489667272.372\"},\n1551: \t\t\t\t\"step\": []string{\"foo+bar\"},\n1559: \t\t\t},\n1560: \t\t\tresponse: \"foo + bar\",\n1561: \t\t},\n1562: \t\t{\n1563: \t\t\tendpoint: api.formatQuery,\n1564: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n1565: \t\t\t\t\"query\": []string{\"invalid_expression/\"},\n1566: \t\t\t},\n1567: \t\t\terrType: errorBadData,\n1568: \t\t},\n1569: \t\t{\n1570: \t\t\tendpoint: api.series,\n1571: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n1572: \t\t\t\t\"match[]\": []string{`test_metric2`},\n1573: \t\t\t},\n1574: \t\t\tresponse: []labels.Labels{\n1575: \t\t\t\tlabels.FromStrings(\"__name__\", \"test_metric2\", \"foo\", \"boo\"),\n1576: \t\t\t},\n1577: \t\t},\n1578: \t\t{\n1579: \t\t\tendpoint: api.series,\n1580: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n1581: \t\t\t\t\"match[]\": []string{`{foo=\"\"}`},\n1582: \t\t\t},\n1583: \t\t\terrType: errorBadData,\n1584: \t\t},\n1585: \t\t{\n1586: \t\t\tendpoint: api.series,\n1587: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n1588: \t\t\t\t\"match[]\": []string{`test_metric1{foo=~\".+o\"}`},\n1589: \t\t\t},\n1590: \t\t\tresponse: []labels.Labels{\n1591: \t\t\t\tlabels.FromStrings(\"__name__\", \"test_metric1\", \"foo\", \"boo\"),\n1592: \t\t\t},\n1593: \t\t},\n1594: \t\t{\n1595: \t\t\tendpoint: api.series,\n1596: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n1597: \t\t\t\t\"match[]\": []string{`test_metric1{foo=~\".+o$\"}`, `test_metric1{foo=~\".+o\"}`},\n1598: \t\t\t},\n1599: \t\t\tresponse: []labels.Labels{\n1600: \t\t\t\tlabels.FromStrings(\"__name__\", \"test_metric1\", \"foo\", \"boo\"),\n1601: \t\t\t},\n1602: \t\t},\n1603: \t\t// Try to overlap the selected series set as much as possible to test the result de-duplication works well.\n1604: \t\t{\n1605: \t\t\tendpoint: api.series,\n1606: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n1607: \t\t\t\t\"match[]\": []string{`test_metric4{foo=~\".+o$\"}`, `test_metric4{dup=~\"^1\"}`},\n1608: \t\t\t},\n1609: \t\t\tresponse: []labels.Labels{\n1610: \t\t\t\tlabels.FromStrings(\"__name__\", \"test_metric4\", \"dup\", \"foo\", \"boo\"),\n1613: \t\t\t},\n1614: \t\t},\n1615: \t\t{\n1616: \t\t\tendpoint: api.series,\n1617: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n1618: \t\t\t\t\"match[]\": []string{`test_metric1{foo=~\".+o\"}`, `none`},\n1619: \t\t\t},\n1620: \t\t\tresponse: []labels.Labels{\n1621: \t\t\t\tlabels.FromStrings(\"__name__\", \"test_metric1\", \"foo\", \"boo\"),\n1622: \t\t\t},\n1623: \t\t},\n1624: \t\t// Start and end before series starts.\n1625: \t\t{\n1626: \t\t\tendpoint: api.series,\n1627: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n1628: \t\t\t\t\"match[]\": []string{`test_metric2`},\n1629: \t\t\t\t\"start\":     []string{\"100001\"},\n1641: \t\t\t},\n1642: \t\t\tresponse: []labels.Labels{},\n1643: \t\t},\n1644: \t\t// Start before series starts, end after series ends.\n1645: \t\t{\n1646: \t\t\tendpoint: \t\t\t},\n2330: \t\t\tresponseAsJSON: `{\"go_threads\": [{\"type\":\"gauge\",\"unit\":\"\",\"help\":\"Number of OS threads created\"},{\"type\":\"gauge\",\"unit\":\"\",\"help\":\"Number of OS threads \t\t\t\t\treturn v[i].Help < v[j].Help\n2336: \t\t\t\t})\n2337: \t\t\t},\n2338: \t\t},\n2339: \t\t// With a specific metric that is not present.\n2340: \t\t{\n2341: \t\t\tendpoint: map[string]string{\n3262: \t\t\t\t\t\"name\": \"host.name\",\n3263: \t\t\t\t},\n3264: \t\t\t\tresponse: []string{\n3265: \t\t\t\t\t\"localhost\",\n3266: \t\t\t\t},\n3267: \t\t\t},\n3268: \t\t\t// \t\t\t\tresponse: []string{\n3476: \t\t\t\t\t\"bar\",\n3477: \t\t\t\t\t\"boo\",\n3478: \t\t\t\t},\n3479: \t\t\t},\n3480: \t\t\t// Try to overlap the selected series set as much as possible to test that the value de-duplication works.\n3481: \t\t\t{\n3482: \t\t\t\tendpoint: api.labelValues,\n3483: \t\t\t\tparams: map[string]string{\n3484: \t\t\t\t\t\"name\": \"foo\",\n3485: \t\t\t\t},\n3486: \t\t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n3487: \t\t\t\t\t\"match[]\": []string{`test_metric4{dup=~\"^1\"}`, `test_metric4{foo=~\".+o$\"}`},\n3488: \t\t\t\t},\n3489: \t\t\t\tresponse: []string{\n3490: \t\t\t\t\t\"bar\",\n3491: \t\t\t\t\t\"boo\",\n3492: \t\t\t\t},\n3493: \t\t\t},\n3494: \t\t\t// Label values with limit.\n3495: \t\t\t{\n3496: \t\t\t\tendpoint: api.labelValues,\n3497: \t\t\t\tparams:
