\\t\\t}\\n1222: \\t} else {\\n1223: \\t\\tres.DroppedTargets = []*DroppedTarget{}\\n1224: \\t}\\n1225: \\treturn apiFuncResult{res, nil, nil, nil}\\n1226: }\\n1227: \\n1228: func matchLabels(lset labels.Labels, matchers []*labels.Matcher) bool {\\n1229: \\tfor _, m := range matchers {\\n1230: \\t\\tif !m.Matches(lset.Get(m.Name)) {\\n1231: \\t\\t\\treturn false\\n1232: \\t\\t}\\n1233: \\t}\\n1234: \\treturn true\\n1235: }\\n1236: \\n1237: func (api *API) targetMetadata(r *http.Request) apiFuncResult {\\n1238: \\tlimit := -1\\n1239: \\tif s := r.FormValue(\\\"limit\\\"); s != \\\"\\\" {\\n1240: \\t\\tvar err error\\n1241: \\t\\tif limit, err = strconv.Atoi(s); err != nil {\\n1242: \\t\\t\\treturn apiFuncResult{nil, &apiError{errorBadData, errors.New(\\\"limit must be a number\\\")}, nil, nil}\\n1243: \\t\\t}\\n1244: \\t}\\n1245: \\n1246: \\tmatchTarget := r.FormValue(\\\"match_target\\\")\\n1247: \\tvar matchers []*labels.Matcher\\n1248: \\tvar err error\\n1249: \\tif matchTarget != \\\"\\\" {\\n1250: \\t\\tmatchers, err = parser.ParseMetricSelector(matchTarget)\\n1251: \\t\\tif err != nil {\\n1252: \\t\\t\\treturn invalidParamError(err, \\\"match_target\\\")\\n1253: \\t\\t}\\n1254: \\t}\\n1255: \\n1256: \\tbuilder := labels.NewBuilder(labels.EmptyLabels())\\n1257: \\tmetric := r.FormValue(\\\"metric\\\")\\n1258: \\tres := []metricMetadata{}\\n1259: \\tfor _, tt := range api.targetRetriever(r.Context()).TargetsActive() {\\n1260: \\t\\tfor _, t := range tt {\\n1261: \\t\\t\\tif limit >= 0 && len(res) >= limit {\\n1262: \\t\\t\\t\\tbreak\\n1263: \\t\\t\\t}\\n1264: \\t\\t\\ttargetLabels := t.Labels(builder)\\n1265: \\t\\t\\t// Filter targets that don't satisfy the label matchers.\\n1266: \\t\\t\\tif matchTarget != \\\"\\\" && !matchLabels(targetLabels, matchers) {\\n1267: \\t\\t\\t\\tcontinue\\n1268: \\t\\t\\t}\\n1269: \\t\\t\\t// If no metric is specified, get the full list for the target.\\n1270: \\t\\t\\tif metric == \\\"\\\" {\\n1271: \\t\\t\\t\\tfor _, md := range t.ListMetadata() {\\n1272: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tres = append(res, metricMetadata{\\n1273: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tTarget:       targetLabels,\\n1274: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tMetricFamily: md.MetricFamily,\\n1275: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tType:         md.Type,\\n1276: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tHelp:         md.Help,\\n1277: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tUnit:         md.Unit,\\n1278: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t})\\n1279: \\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n1280: \\t\\t\\t\\tcontinue\\n1281: \\t\\t\\t}\\n1282: \\t\\t\\t// Get metadata for the specified metric.\\n1283: \\t\\t\\tif md, ok := t.GetMetadata(metric); ok {\\n1284: \\t\\t\\t\\tres = append(res, metricMetadata{\\n1285: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tTarget: targetLabels,\\n1286: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tType:   md.Type,\\n1287: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tHelp:   md.Help,\\n1288: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tUnit:   md.Unit,\\n1289: \\t\\t\\t\\t})\\n1290: \\t\\t\\t}\\n1291: \\t\\t}\\n1292: \\t}\\n1293: \\n1294: \\treturn apiFuncResult{res, nil, nil, nil}\\n1295: }\\n1296: \\n1297: type metricMetadata struct {\\n1298: \\tTarget       labels.Labels    `json:\\\"target\\\"`\\n1299: \\tMetricFamily string           `json:\\\"metric,omitempty\\\"`\\n1300: \\tType         model.MetricType `json:\\\"type\\\"`\\n1301: \\tHelp         string           `json:\\\"help\\\"`\\n1302: \\tUnit         string           `json:\\\"unit\\\"`\\n1303: }\\n1304: \\n1305: // AlertmanagerDiscovery has all the active Alertmanagers.\\n1306: type AlertmanagerDiscovery struct {\\n1307: \\tActiveAlertmanagers  []*AlertmanagerTarget `json:\\\"activeAlertmanagers\\\"`\\n1308: \\tDroppedAlertmanagers []*AlertmanagerTarget `json:\\\"droppedAlertmanagers\\\"`\\n1309: }\\n1310: \\n1311: // AlertmanagerTarget has info on one AM.\\n1312: type AlertmanagerTarget struct {\\n1313: \\tURL string `json:\\\"url\\\"`\\n1314: }\\n1315: \\n1316: func (api *API) alertmanagers(r *http.Request) apiFuncResult {\\n1317: \\turls := api.alertmanagerRetriever(r.Context()).Alertmanagers()\\n1318: \\tdroppedURLS := api.alertmanagerRetriever(r.Context()).DroppedAlertmanagers()\\n1319: \\tams := &AlertmanagerDiscovery{ActiveAlertmanagers: make([]*AlertmanagerTarget, len(urls)), DroppedAlertmanagers: make([]*AlertmanagerTarget, len(droppedURLS))}\\n1320: \\tfor i, url := range urls {\\n1321: \\t\\tams.ActiveAlertmanagers[i] = &AlertmanagerTarget{URL: url.String()}\\n1322: \\t}\\n1323: \\tfor i, url := range droppedURLS {\\n1324: \\t\\tams.DroppedAlertmanagers[i] = &AlertmanagerTarget{URL: url.String()}\\n1325: \\t}\\n1326: \\treturn apiFuncResult{ams, nil, nil, nil}\\n1327: }\\n1328: \\n1329: // AlertDiscovery has info for all active alerts.\\n1330: type AlertDiscovery struct {\\n1331: \\tAlerts []*Alert `json:\\\"alerts\\\"`\\n1332: }\\n1333: \\n1334: // Alert has info for an alert.\\n1335: type Alert struct {\\n1336: \\tLabels          labels.Labels `json:\\\"labels\\\"`\\n1337: \\tAnnotations     labels.Labels `json:\\\"annotations\\\"`\\n1338: \\tState           string        `json:\\\"state\\\"`\\n1339: \\tActiveAt        *time.Time    `json:\\\"activeAt,omitempty\\\"`\\n1340: \\tKeepFiringSince *time.Time    `json:\\\"keepFiringSince,omitempty\\\"`\\n1341: \\tValue           string        `json:\\\"value\\\"`\\n1342: }\\n1343: \\n1344: func (api *API) alerts(r *http.Request) apiFuncResult {\\n1345: \\talertingRules := api.rulesRetriever(r.Context()).AlertingRules()\\n1346: \\talerts := []*Alert{}\\n1347: \\n1348: \\tfor _, alertingRule := range alertingRules {\\n1349: \\t\\talerts = append(\\n1350: \\t\\t\\talerts,\\n1351: \\t\\t\\trulesAlertsToAPIAlerts(alertingRule.ActiveAlerts())...,\\n1352: \\t\\t)\\n1353: \\t}\\n1354: \\n1355: \\tres := &AlertDiscovery{Alerts: alerts}\\n1356: \\n1357: \\treturn apiFuncResult{res, nil, nil, nil}\\n1358: }\\n1359: \\n1360: func rulesAlertsToAPIAlerts(rulesAlerts []*rules.Alert) []*Alert {\\n1361: \\tapiAlerts := make([]*Alert, len(rulesAlerts))\\n1362: \\tfor i, ruleAlert := range rulesAlerts {\\n1363: \\t\\tapiAlerts[i] = &Alert{\\n1364: \\t\\t\\tLabels:      ruleAlert.Labels,\\n1365: \\t\\t\\tAnnotations: ruleAlert.Annotations,\\n1366: \\t\\t\\tState:       ruleAlert.State.String(),\\n1367: \\t\\t\\tActiveAt:    &ruleAlert.ActiveAt,\\n1368: \\t\\t\\tValue:       strconv.FormatFloat(ruleAlert.Value, 'e', -1, 64),\\n1369: \\t\\t}\\n1370: \\t\\tif !ruleAlert.KeepFiringSince.IsZero() {\\n1371: \\t\\t\\tapiAlerts[i].KeepFiringSince = &ruleAlert.KeepFiringSince\\n1372: \\t\\t}\\n1373: \\t}\\n1374: \\n1375: \\treturn apiAlerts\\n1376: }\\n1377: \\n1378: func (api *API) metricMetadata(r *http.Request) apiFuncResult {\\n1379: \\tmetrics := map[string]map[metadata.Metadata]struct{}{}\\n1380: \\n1381: \\tlimit := -1\\n1382: \\tif s := r.FormValue(\\\"limit\\\"); s != \\\"\\\" {\\n1383: \\t\\tvar err error\\n1384: \\t\\tif \\t\\t\\ttest_metric2{foo=\\\"baz\\\", abc=\\\"qwerty\\\"} 1+0x100\\n554: \\t`)\\n555: \\tt.Cleanup(func() { storage.Close() })\\n556: \\tapi := &API{\\n557: \\t\\tQueryable: storage,\\n558: \\t\\treturn r, err\\n573: \\t}\\n574: \\n575: \\tfor _, tc := range []struct {\\n576: \\t\\tname              string\\n577: \\t\\tapi               *API\\n578: \\t\\tmatchers          []string\\n579: \\t\\texpected          []labels.Labels\\n580: \\t\\texpectedErrorType errorType\\n581: \\t}{\\n582: \\t\\t{\\n583: \\t\\t\\tname:              \\\"no matchers\\\",\\n584: \\t\\t\\texpectedErrorType: errorBadData,\\n585: \\t\\t\\tapi:               api,\\n586: \\t\\t},\\n587: \\t\\t{\\n588: \\t\\t\\tname:     \\\"non empty label matcher\\\",\\n589: \\t\\t\\tmatchers: []string{`{foo=~\\\".+\\\"}`},\\n590: \\t\\t\\texpected: []labels.Labels{\\n591: \\t\\t\\t\\tlabels.FromStrings(\\\"__name__\\\", \\\"test_metric2\\\", \\\"abc\\\", \\\"qwerty\\\", \\\"foo\\\", \\\"baz\\\"),\\n592: \\t\\t\\t\\tlabels.FromStrings(\\\"__name__\\\", \\\"test_metric2\\\", \\\"foo\\\", \\\"boo\\\"),\\n593: \\t\\t\\t\\tlabels.FromStrings(\\\"__name__\\\", \\\"test_metric2\\\", \\\"foo\\\", \\\"boo\\\", \\\"xyz\\\", \\\"qwerty\\\"),\\n594: \\t\\t\\t},\\n595: \\t\\t\\tapi: api,\\n596: \\t\\t},\\n597: \\t\\t{\\n598: \\t\\t\\tname:     \\\"exact label matcher\\\",\\n599: \\t\\t\\tmatchers: []string{`{foo=\\\"boo\\\"}`},\\n600: \\t\\t\\texpected: []labels.Labels{\\n601: \\t\\t\\t\\tlabels.FromStrings(\\\"__name__\\\", \\\"test_metric2\\\", \\\"foo\\\", \\\"boo\\\"),\\n602: \\t\\t\\t\\tlabels.FromStrings(\\\"__name__\\\", \\\"test_metric2\\\", \\\"foo\\\", \\\"boo\\\", \\\"xyz\\\", \\\"qwerty\\\"),\\n603: \\t\\t\\t},\\n604: \\t\\t\\tapi: api,\\n605: \\t\\t},\\n606: \\t\\t{\\n607: \\t\\t\\tname:     \\\"two matchers\\\",\\n608: \\t\\t\\tmatchers: []string{`{foo=\\\"boo\\\"}`, `{foo=\\\"baz\\\"}`},\\n609: \\t\\t\\texpected: []labels.Labels{\\n610: \\t\\t\\t\\tlabels.FromStrings(\\\"__name__\\\", \\\"test_metric2\\\", \\\"abc\\\", \\\"qwerty\\\", \\\"foo\\\", \\\"baz\\\"),\\n611: \\t\\t\\t\\tlabels.FromStrings(\\\"__name__\\\", \\\"test_metric2\\\", \\\"foo\\\", \\\"boo\\\"),\\n612: \\t\\t\\t\\tlabels.FromStrings(\\\"__name__\\\", \\\"test_metric2\\\", \\\"foo\\\", \\\"boo\\\", \\\"xyz\\\", \\\"qwerty\\\"),\\n613: \\t\\t\\t},\\n614: \\t\\t\\tapi: api,\\n615: \\t\\t},\\n616: \\t\\t{\\n617: \\t\\t\\tname:              \\\"exec error type\\\",\\n618: \\t\\t\\tmatchers:          []string{`{foo=\\\"boo\\\"}`, `{foo=\\\"baz\\\"}`},\\n619: \\t\\t\\texpectedErrorType: errorExec,\\n620: \\t\\t\\tapi: &API{\\n621: \\t\\t\\t\\tQueryable: errorTestQueryable{err: errors.New(\\\"generic\\\")},\\n622: \\t\\t\\t},\\n623: \\t\\t},\\n624: \\t\\t{\\n625: \\t\\t\\tname:              \\\"storage error type\\\",\\n626: \\t\\t\\tmatchers:          []string{`{foo=\\\"boo\\\"}`, `{foo=\\\"baz\\\"}`},\\n627: \\t\\t\\texpectedErrorType: errorInternal,\\n628: \\t\\t\\tapi: &API{\\n629: \\t\\t\\t\\tQueryable: errorTestQueryable{err: promql.ErrStorage{Err: errors.New(\\\"generic\\\")}},\\n630: \\t\\t\\t},\\n631: \\t\\t},\\n632: \\t} {\\n633: \\t\\tt.Run(tc.name, func(t *testing.T) {\\n634: \\t\\t\\tctx := context.Background()\\n635: \\t\\t\\treq, err := request(http.MethodGet, tc.matchers...)\\n636: \\t\\t\\trequire.NoError(t, err)\\n637: \\t\\t\\tres := tc.api.series(req.WithContext(ctx))\\n638: \\t\\t\\tassertAPIError(t, res.err, tc.expectedErrorType)\\n639: \\t\\t\\tif tc.expectedErrorType == errorNone {\\n640: \\t\\t\\t\\tr := res.data.([]labels.Labels)\\n641: \\t\\t\\t\\tsort.Sort(byLabels(tc.expected))\\n642: \\t\\t\\t\\tsort.Sort(byLabels(r))\\n643: \\t\\t\\t\\ttestutil.RequireEqual(t, tc.expected, r)\\n644: \\t\\t\\t}\\n645: \\t\\t})\\n646: \\t}\\n647: }\\n648: \\n649: func TestQueryExemplars(t *testing.T) {\\n650: \\tstart := time.Unix(0, 0)\\n651: \\tstorage := promqltest.LoadedStorage(t, `\\n652: \\t\\tload 1m\\n653: \\t\\t\\ttest_metric1{foo=\\\"bar\\\"} 0+100x100\\n654: \\t\\t\\ttest_metric1{foo=\\\"boo\\\"} 1+0x100\\n655: \\t\\t\\ttest_metric2{foo=\\\"boo\\\"} 1+0x100\\n656: \\t\\t\\ttest_metric3{foo=\\\"bar\\\", dup=\\\"1\\\"} 1+0x100\\n657: \\t\\t\\ttest_metric3{foo=\\\"boo\\\", dup=\\\"1\\\"} 1+0x100\\n658: \\t\\t\\ttest_metric4{foo=\\\"bar\\\", dup=\\\"1\\\"} 1+0x100\\n659: \\t\\t\\ttest_metric4{foo=\\\"boo\\\", dup=\\\"1\\\"} 1+0x100\\n660: \\t\\t\\ttest_metric4{foo=\\\"boo\\\"} 1+0x100\\n661: \\t`)\\n662: \\tt.Cleanup(func() { storage.Close() })\\n663: \\n664: \\tapi := &API{\\n665: \\t\\tQueryable:         storage,\\n666: \\t\\tQueryEngine:       testEngine(t),\\n667: \\t\\tExemplarQueryable: storage.ExemplarQueryable(),\\n668: \\t}\\n669: \\n670: \\trequest := func(method string, qs url.Values) (*http.Request, error) {\\n671: \\t\\tu, err := url.Parse(\\\"http://example.com\\\")\\n672: \\t\\trequire.NoError(t, err)\\n673: \\t\\tu.RawQuery = qs.Encode()\\n674: \\t\\tr, err := http.NewRequest(method, u.String(), nil)\\n675: \\t\\tif method == http.MethodPost {\\n676: \\t\\t\\tr.Header.Set(\\\"Content-Type\\\", \\\"application/x-www-form-urlencoded\\\")\\n677: \\t\\t}\\n678: \\t\\treturn r, err\\n679: \\t}\\n680: \\n681: \\tfor _, tc := range []struct {\\n682: \\t\\tname              string\\n683: \\t\\tquery             url.Values\\n684: \\t\\texemplars         []exemplar.QueryResult\\n685: \\t\\tapi               *API\\n686: \\t\\texpectedErrorType errorType\\n687: \\t}{\\n688: \\t\\t{\\n689: \\t\\t\\tname: \\\"no error\\\",\\n690: \\t\\t\\tapi:  api,\\n691: \\t\\t\\tquery: url.Values{\\n692: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"query\\\": []string{`test_metric3{foo=\\\"boo\\\"} - test_metric4{foo=\\\"bar\\\"}`},\\n693: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"start\\\": []string{\\\"0\\\"},\\n694: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"end\\\":   []string{\\\"4\\\"},\\n695: \\t\\t\\t},\\n696: \\t\\t\\texemplars: []exemplar.QueryResult{\\n697: \\t\\t\\t\\t{\\n698: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tSeriesLabels: labels.FromStrings(\\\"__name__\\\", \\\"test_metric3\\\", \\\"foo\\\", \\\"boo\\\", \\\"dup\\\", \\\"1\\\"),\\n699: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tExemplars: []exemplar.Exemplar{\\n700: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t{\\n701: "{\"content\":\"1400: \\t\\t\\t\\tfor _, mm := range t.ListMetadata() {\\n1401: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tm := metadata.Metadata{Type: mm.Type, Help: mm.Help, Unit: mm.Unit}\\n1402: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tms, ok := metrics[mm.MetricFamily]\\n1403: \\n1404: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tif limitPerMetric > 0 && len(ms) >= limitPerMetric {\\n1405: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tcontinue\\n1406: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n1407: \\n1408: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tif !ok {\\n1409: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tms = map[metadata.Metadata]struct{}{}\\n1410: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tmetrics[mm.MetricFamily] = ms\\n1411: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n1412: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tms[m] = struct{}{}\\n1413: \\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n1414: \\t\\t\\t\\tcontinue\\n1415: \\t\\t\\t}\\n1416: \\n1417: \\t\\t\\tif md, ok := t.GetMetadata(metric); ok {\\n1418: \\t\\t\\t\\tm := metadata.Metadata{Type: md.Type, Help: md.Help, Unit: md.Unit}\\n1419: \\t\\t\\t\\tms, ok := metrics[md.MetricFamily]\\n1420: \\n1421: \\t\\t\\t\\tif limitPerMetric > 0 && len(ms) >= limitPerMetric {\\n1422: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tcontinue\\n1423: \\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n1424: \\n1425: \\t\\t\\t\\tif !ok {\\n1426: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tms = map[metadata.Metadata]struct{}{}\\n1427: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tmetrics[md.MetricFamily] = ms\\n1428: \\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n1429: \\t\\t\\t\\tms[m] = struct{}{}\\n1430: \\t\\t\\t}\\n1431: \\t\\t}\\n1432: \\t}\\n1433: \\n1434: \\t// Put the elements from the pseudo-set into a slice for marshaling.\\n1435: \\tres := map[string][]metadata.Metadata{}\\n1436: \\tfor name, set := range metrics {\\n1437: \\t\\tif limit >= 0 && len(res) >= limit {\\n1438: \\t\\t\\tbreak\\n1439: \\t\\t}\\n1440: \\n1441: \\t\\ts := []metadata.Metadata{}\\n1442: \\t\\tfor metadata := range set {\\n1443: \\t\\t\\ts = append(s, metadata)\\n1444: \\t\\t}\\n1445: \\t\\tres[name] = s\\n1446: \\t}\\n1447: \\n1448: \\treturn apiFuncResult{res, nil, nil, nil}\\n1449: }\\n1450: \\n1451: // RuleDiscovery has info for all rules.\\n1452: type RuleDiscovery struct {\\n1453: \\tRuleGroups     []*RuleGroup `json:\\\"groups\\\"`\\n1454: \\tGroupNextToken string       `json:\\\"groupNextToken,omitempty\\\"`\\n1455: }\\n1456: \\n1457: // RuleGroup has info for rules which are part of a group.\\n1458: type RuleGroup struct {\\n1459: \\tName string `json:\\\"name\\\"`\\n1460: \\tFile string `json:\\\"file\\\"`\\n1461: \\t// In order to preserve rule ordering, while exposing type (alerting or recording)\\n1462: \\t// specific properties, both alerting and recording rules are exposed in the\\n1463: \\t// same array.\\n1464: \\tRules          []Rule    `json:\\\"rules\\\"`\\n1465: \\tInterval       float64   `json:\\\"interval\\\"`\\n1466: \\tLimit          int       `json:\\\"limit\\\"`\\n1467: \\tEvaluationTime float64   `json:\\\"evaluationTime\\\"`\\n1468: \\tLastEvaluation time.Time `json:\\\"lastEvaluation\\\"`\\n1469: }\\n1470: \\n1471: type Rule any\\n1472: \\n1473: type AlertingRule struct {\\n1474: \\t// State can be \\\"pending\\\", \\\"firing\\\", \\\"inactive\\\".\\n1475: \\tState          string           `json:\\\"state\\\"`\\n1476: \\tName           string           `json:\\\"name\\\"`\\n1477: \\tQuery          string           `json:\\\"query\\\"`\\n1478: \\tDuration       float64          `json:\\\"duration\\\"`\\n1479: \\tKeepFiringFor  float64          `json:\\\"keepFiringFor\\\"`\\n1480: \\tLabels         labels.Labels    `json:\\\"labels\\\"`\\n1481: \\tAnnotations    labels.Labels    `json:\\\"annotations\\\"`\\n1482: \\tAlerts         []*Alert         `json:\\\"alerts\\\"`\\n1483: \\tHealth         rules.RuleHealth `json:\\\"health\\\"`\\n1484: \\tLastError      string           `json:\\\"lastError,omitempty\\\"`\\n1485: \\tEvaluationTime float64          `json:\\\"evaluationTime\\\"`\\n1486: \\tLastEvaluation time.Time        `json:\\\"lastEvaluation\\\"`\\n1487: \\t// Type of an alertingRule is always \\\"alerting\\\".\\n1488: \\tType string `json:\\\"type\\\"`\\n1489: }\\n1490: \\n1491: type RecordingRule struct {\\n1492: \\tName           string           `json:\\\"name\\\"`\\n1493: \\tQuery          string           `json:\\\"query\\\"`\\n1494: \\tLabels         labels.Labels    `json:\\\"labels,omitempty\\\"`\\n1495: \\tHealth         rules.RuleHealth `json:\\\"health\\\"`\\n1496: \\tLastError      string           `json:\\\"lastError,omitempty\\\"`\\n1497: \\tEvaluationTime float64          `json:\\\"evaluationTime\\\"`\\n1498: \\tLastEvaluation time.Time        `json:\\\"lastEvaluation\\\"`\\n1499: \\t// Type of a recordingRule is always \\\"recording\\\".\\n1500: \\tType string `json:\\\"type\\\"`\\n1501: }\\n1502: \\n1503: func (api *API) rules(r *http.Request) apiFuncResult {\\n1504: \\tif err := r.ParseForm(); err != nil {\\n1505: \\t\\treturn apiFuncResult{nil, &apiError{errorBadData, fmt.Errorf(\\\"error parsing form values: %w\\\", err)}, nil, nil}\\n1506: \\t}\\n1507: \\n1508: \\tqueryFormToSet := func(values []string) map[string]struct{} {\\n1509: \\t\\tset := make(map[string]struct{}, len(values))\\n1510: \\t\\tfor _, v := range values {\\n1511: \\t\\t\\tset[v] = struct{}{}\\n1512: \\t\\t}\\n1513: \\t\\treturn set\\n1514: \\t}\\n1515: \\n1516: \\trnSet := queryFormToSet(r.Form[\\\"rule_name[]\\\"])\\n1517: \\trgSet := queryFormToSet(r.Form[\\\"rule_group[]\\\"])\\n1518: \\tfSet := queryFormToSet(r.Form[\\\"file[]\\\"])\\n1519: \\n1520: \\tmatcherSets, err := parseMatchersParam(r.Form[\\\"match[]\\\"])\\n1521: \\tif err != nil {\\n1522: \\t\\treturn apiFuncResult{nil, &apiError{errorBadData, err}, nil, nil}\\n1523: \\t}\\n1524: \\n1525: \\truleGroups := api.rulesRetriever(r.Context()).RuleGroups()\\n1526: \\tres := &RuleDiscovery{RuleGroups: make([]*RuleGroup, 0, len(ruleGroups))}\\n1527: \\ttyp := strings.ToLower(r.URL.Query().Get(\\\"type\\\"))\\n1528: \\n1529: \\tif typ != \\\"\\\" && typ != \\\"alert\\\" && typ != \\\"record\\\" {\\n1530: \\t\\treturn invalidParamError(fmt.Errorf(\\\"not supported value %q\\\", typ), \\\"type\\\")\\n1531: \\t}\\n1532: \\n1533: \\treturnAlerts := typ == \\\"\\\" || typ == \\\"alert\\\"\\n1534: \\treturnRecording := typ == \\\"\\\" || typ == \\\"record\\\"\\n1535: \\n1536: \\texcludeAlerts, err := parseExcludeAlerts(r)\\n1537: \\tif err != nil {\\n1538: \\t\\treturn invalidParamError(err, \\\"exclude_alerts\\\")\\n1539: \\t}\\n1540: \\n1541: \\tmaxGroups, nextToken, parseErr := parseListRulesPaginationRequest(r)\\n1542: \\tif parseErr != nil {\\n1543: \\t\\treturn *parseErr\\n1544: \\t}\\n1545: \\n1546: \\trgs := make([]*RuleGroup, 0, len(ruleGroups))\\n1547: \\n1548: \\tfoundToken := false\\n1549: \\n1550: \\tfor _, grp := range ruleGroups {\\n1551: \\t\\tif maxGroups > 0 && nextToken != \\\"\\\" && !foundToken {\\n1552: \\t\\t\\tif nextToken != getRuleGroupNextToken(grp.File(), grp.Name()) {\\n1553: \\t\\t\\t\\tcontinue\\n1554: \\t\\t\\t}\\n1555: \\t\\t\\tfoundToken = true\\n1556: \\t\\t}\\n1557: \\n1558: \\t\\tif len(rgSet) > 0 {\\n1559: \\t\\t\\tif _, ok := rgSet[grp.Name()]; !ok {\\n1560: \\t\\t\\t\\tcontinue\\n1561: \\t\\t\\t}\\n1562: \\t\\t}\\n1563: \\n1564: \\t\\tif len(fSet) > 0 {\\n1565: \\t\\t\\tif _, ok := fSet[grp.File()]; !ok {\\n1566: \\t\\t\\t\\tcontinue\\n1567: \\t\\t\\t}\\n1568: \\t\\t}\\n1569: \\n1570: \\t\\tapiRuleGroup := &RuleGroup{\\n1571: \\t\\t\\tName:           grp.Name(),\\n1572: \\t\\t\\tFile:           grp.File(),\\n1573: \\t\\t\\tInterval:       grp.Interval().Seconds(),\\n1574: \\t\\t\\tLimit:          grp.Limit(),\\n1575: \\t\\t\\tRules:          []Rule{},\\n1576: \\t\\t\\tEvaluationTime: grp.GetEvaluationTime().Seconds(),\\n1577: \\t\\t\\tLastEvaluation: grp.GetLastEvaluation(),\\n1578: \\t\\t}\\n1579: \\n1580: \\t\\tfor _, rr := range grp.Rules(matcherSets...) {\\n1581: \\t\\t\\tvar enrichedRule Rule\\n1582: \\n1583: \\t\\t\\tif len(rnSet) > 0 {\\n1584: \\t\\t\\t\\tif _, ok := rnSet[rr.Name()]; !ok {\\n1585: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tcontinue\\n1586: \\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n1587: \\t\\t\\t}\\n1588: \\n1589: \\t\\t\\tlastError := \\\"\\\"\\n1590: \\t\\t\\tif rr.LastError() != nil {\\n1591: \\t\\t\\t\\tlastError = rr.LastError().Error()\\n1592: \\t\\t\\t}\\n1593: \\t\\t\\tswitch rule := rr.(type) {\\n1594: \\t\\t\\tcase *rules.AlertingRule:\\n1595: \\t\\t\\t\\tif !returnAlerts {\\n1596: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tbreak\\n1597: \\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n1598: \\t\\t\\t\\tvar activeAlerts []*Alert\\n1599: \\t\\t\\t\\tif !excludeAlerts {\\n1600: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tactiveAlerts = rulesAlertsToAPIAlerts(rule.ActiveAlerts())\\n1601: \\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n1602: \\n1603: \\t\\t\\t\\tenrichedRule = AlertingRule{\\n1604: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tState:          rule.State().String(),\\n1605: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tName:           rule.Name(),\\n1606: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tQuery:          rule.Query().String(),\\n1607: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tDuration:       rule.HoldDuration().Seconds(),\\n1608: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tKeepFiringFor:  rule.KeepFiringFor().Seconds(),\\n1609: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tLabels:         rule.Labels(),\\n1610: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tAnnotations:    rule.Annotations(),\\n1611: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tAlerts:         activeAlerts,\\n1612: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tHealth:         rule.Health(),\\n1613: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tLastError:      lastError,\\n1614: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tEvaluationTime: rule.GetEvaluationDuration().Seconds(),\\n1615: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tLastEvaluation: rule.GetEvaluationTimestamp(),\\n1616: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tType:           \\\"alerting\\\",\\n1617: \\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n1618: \\n1619: \\t\\t\\tcase *rules.RecordingRule:\\n1620: \\t\\t\\t\\tif !returnRecording {\\n1621: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tbreak\\n1622: \\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n1623: \\t\\t\\t\\tenrichedRule = RecordingRule{\\n1624: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tName:           rule.Name(),\\n1625: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tQuery:          rule.Query().String(),\\n1626: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tLabels:         rule.Labels(),\\n1627: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tHealth:         rule.Health(),\\n1628: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tLastError:      lastError,\\n1629: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tEvaluationTime: rule.GetEvaluationDuration().Seconds(),\\n1630: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tLastEvaluation: rule.GetEvaluationTimestamp(),\\n1631: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tType:           \\\"recording\\\",\\n1632: \\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n1633: \\t\\t\\tdefault:\\n1634: \\t\\t\\t\\terr := fmt.Errorf(\\\"failed to assert type of rule '%v'\\\", rule.Name())\\n1635: \\t\\t\\t\\treturn apiFuncResult{nil, &apiError{errorInternal, err}, nil, nil}\\n1636: \\t\\t\\t}\\n1637: \\n1638: \\t\\t\\tif enrichedRule != nil {\\n1639: \\t\\t\\t\\tapiRuleGroup.Rules = append(apiRuleGroup.Rules, enrichedRule)\\n1640: \\t\\t\\t}\\n1641: \\t\\t}\\n1642: \\n1643: \\t\\t// If the rule group response has no rules, skip it - this means we filtered all the rules of this group.\\n1644: \\t\\tif len(apiRuleGroup.Rules) > 0 {\\n1645: \\t\\t\\tif maxGroups > 0 && len(rgs) == int(maxGroups) {\\n1646: \\t\\t\\t\\t// We've reached the capacity of our page plus one. That means that for sure there will be at least one\\n1647: \\t\\t\\t\\t// rule group in a subsequent request. Therefore a next token is required.\\n1648: \\t\\t\\t\\tres.GroupNextToken = getRuleGroupNextToken(grp.File(), grp.Name())\\n1649: \\t\\t\\t\\tbreak\\n1650: \\t\\t\\t}\\n1651: \\t\\t\\trgs = append(rgs, apiRuleGroup)\\n1652: \\t\\t}\\n1653: \\t}\\n1654: \\n1655: \\tif maxGroups > 0 && nextToken != \\\"\\\" && !foundToken {\\n1656: \\t\\treturn invalidParamError(fmt.Errorf(\\\"invalid group_next_token '%v'. were rule groups changed?\\\", nextToken), \\\"group_next_token\\\")\\n1657: \\t}\\n1658: \\n1659: \\tres.RuleGroups = rgs\\n1660: \\treturn apiFuncResult{res, nil, nil, nil}\\n1661: }\\n1662: \\n1663: func parseExcludeAlerts(r *http.Request) (bool, error) {\\n1664: \\texcludeAlertsParam := strings.ToLower(r.URL.Query().Get(\\\"exclude_alerts\\\"))\\n1665: \\n1666: \\tif excludeAlertsParam == \\\"\\\" {\\n1667: \\t\\treturn false, nil\\n1668: \\t}\\n1669: \\n1670: \\texcludeAlerts, err := strconv.ParseBool(excludeAlertsParam)\\n1671: \\tif err != nil {\\n1672: \\t\\treturn false, fmt.Errorf(\\\"error converting exclude_alerts: %w\\\", err)\\n1673: \\t}\\n1674: \\treturn excludeAlerts, nil\\n1675: }\\n1676: \\n1677: func parseListRulesPaginationRequest(r *http.Request) (int64, string, *apiFuncResult) {\\n1678: \\tvar (\\n1679: \\t\\tparsedMaxGroups int64 = -1\\n1680: \\t\\terr             error\\n1681: \\t)\\n1682: \\tmaxGroups := r.URL.Query().Get(\\\"group_limit\\\")\\n1683: \\tnextToken := r.URL.Query().Get(\\\"group_next_token\\\")\\n1684: \\n1685: \\tif nextToken != \\\"\\\" && maxGroups == \\\"\\\" {\\n1686: \\t\\terrResult := invalidParamError(errors.New(\\\"group_limit needs to be present in order to paginate over the groups\\\"), \\\"group_next_token\\\")\\n1687: \\t\\treturn -1, \\\"\\\", &errResult\\n1688: \\t}\\n1689: \\n1690: \\tif maxGroups != \\\"\\\" {\\n1691: \\t\\tparsedMaxGroups, err = strconv.ParseInt(maxGroups, 10, 32)\\n1692: \\t\\tif err != nil {\\n1693: \\t\\t\\terrResult := invalidParamError(fmt.Errorf(\\\"group_limit needs to be a valid number: %w\\\", err), \\\"group_limit\\\")\\n1694: \\t\\t\\treturn -1, \\\"\\\", &errResult\\n1695: \\t\\t}\\n1696: \\t\\tif parsedMaxGroups <= 0 {\\n1697: \\t\\t\\terrResult := invalidParamError(errors.New(\\\"group_limit needs to be greater than 0\\\"), \\\"group_limit\\\")\\n1698: \\t\\t\\treturn -1, \\\"\\\", &errResult\\n1699: \\t\\t}\\n1700: \\t}\\n1701: \\n1702: \\tif parsedMaxGroups > 0 {\\n1703: \\t\\treturn parsedMaxGroups, nextToken, nil\\n1704: \\t}\\n1705: \\n1706: \\treturn -1, \\\"\\\", nil\\n1707: }\\n1708: \\n1709: func getRuleGroupNextToken(file, group string) string {\\n1710: \\th := sha1.New()\\n1711: \\th.Write([]byte(file + \\\";\\\" + group))\\n1712: \\treturn hex.EncodeToString(h.Sum(nil))\\n1713: }\\n1714: \\n1715: type prometheusConfig struct {\\n1716: \\tYAML string `json:\\\"yaml\\\"`\\n1717: }\\n1718: \\n1719: func (api *API) serveRuntimeInfo(*http.Request) apiFuncResult {\\n1720: \\tstatus, err := api.runtimeInfo()\\n1721: \\tif err != nil {\\n1722: \\t\\treturn apiFuncResult{status, &apiError{errorInternal, err}, nil, nil}\\n1723: \\t}\\n1724: \\treturn apiFuncResult{status, nil, nil, nil}\\n1725: }\\n1726: \\n1727: func (api *API) serveBuildInfo(*http.Request) apiFuncResult {\\n1728: \\treturn apiFuncResult{api.buildInfo, nil, nil, nil}\\n1729: }\\n1730: \\n1731: func (api *API) serveConfig(*http.Request) apiFuncResult {\\n1732: \\tcfg := &prometheusConfig{\\n1733: \\t\\tYAML: api.config().String(),\\n1734: \\t}\\n1735: \\treturn apiFuncResult{cfg, nil, nil, nil}\\n1736: }\\n1737: \\n1738: func (api *API) serveFlags(*http.Request) apiFuncResult {\\n1739: \\treturn apiFuncResult{api.flagsMap, nil, nil, nil}\\n1740: }\\n1741: \\n1742: // TSDBStat holds the information about individual cardinality.\\n1743: type TSDBStat struct {\\n1744: \\tName  string `json:\\\"name\\\"`\\n1745: \\tValue uint64 `json:\\\"value\\\"`\\n1746: }\\n1747: \\n1748: // HeadStats has information about the TSDB head.\\n1749: type HeadStats struct {\\n1750: \\tNumSeries     uint64 `json:\\\"numSeries\\\"`\\n1751: \\tNumLabelPairs int    `json:\\\"numLabelPairs\\\"`\\n1752: \\tChunkCount    int64  `json:\\\"chunkCount\\\"`\\n1753: \\tMinTime       int64  `json:\\\"minTime\\\"`\\n1754: \\tMaxTime       int64  `json:\\\"maxTime\\\"`\\n1755: }\\n1756: \\n1757: // TSDBStatus has information of cardinality statistics from postings.\\n1758: type TSDBStatus struct {\\n1759: \\tHeadStats                   HeadStats  `json:\\\"headStats\\\"`\\n1760: \\tSeriesCountByMetricName     []TSDBStat `json:\\\"seriesCountByMetricName\\\"`\\n1761: \\tLabelValueCountByLabelName  []TSDBStat `json:\\\"labelValueCountByLabelName\\\"`\\n1762: \\tMemoryInBytesByLabelName    []TSDBStat `json:\\\"memoryInBytesByLabelName\\\"`\\n1763: \\tSeriesCountByLabelValuePair []TSDBStat `json:\\\"seriesCountByLabelValuePair\\\"`\\n1764: }\\n1765: \\n1766: // TSDBStatsFromIndexStats converts a index.Stat slice to a TSDBStat slice.\\n1767: func TSDBStatsFromIndexStats(stats []index.Stat) []TSDBStat {\\n1768: \\tresult := make([]TSDBStat, 0, len(stats))\\n1769: \\tfor _, item := range stats {\\n1770: \\t\\titem := TSDBStat{Name: item.Name, Value: item.Count}\\n1771: \\t\\tresult = append(result, item)\\n1772: \\t}\\n1773: \\treturn result\\n1774: }\\n1775: \\n1776: func (api *API) serveTSDBBlocks(*http.Request) apiFuncResult {\\n1777: \\tblockMetas, err := api.db.BlockMetas()\\n1778: \\tif err != nil {\\n1779: \\t\\treturn apiFuncResult{nil, &apiError{errorInternal, fmt.Errorf(\\\"error getting block metadata: %w\\\", err)}, nil, nil}\\n1780: \\t}\\n1781: \\n1782: \\treturn apiFuncResult{\\n1783: \\t\\tdata: map[string][]tsdb.BlockMeta{\\n1784: \\t\\t\\t\\\"blocks\\\": blockMetas,\\n1785: \\t\\t},\\n1786: \\t}\\n1787: }\\n1788: \\n1789: func (api *API) serveTSDBStatus(r *http.Request) apiFuncResult {\\n1790: \\tlimit := 10\\n1791: \\tif s := r.FormValue(\\\"limit\\\"); s != \\\"\\\" {\\n1792: \\t\\tvar err error\\n1793: \\t\\tif limit, err = strconv.Atoi(s); err != nil || limit < 1 {\\n1794: \\t\\t\\treturn apiFuncResult{nil, &apiError{errorBadData, errors.New(\\\"limit must be a positive number\\\")}, nil, nil}\\n1795: \\t\\t}\\n1796: \\t}\\n1797: \\ts, err := api.db.Stats(labels.MetricName, limit)\\n1798: \\tif err != nil {\\n1799: \\t\\treturn apiFuncResult{nil, &apiError{errorInternal, err}, nil, nil}\\n1800: \\t}\\n1801: url.Parse(\\\"http://example.com\\\")\\n892: \\t\\trequire.NoError(t, err)\\n893: \\t\\tq := u.Query()\\n894: \\t\\tq.Add(\\\"stats\\\", param)\\n895: \\t\\tq.Add(\\\"query\\\", \\\"up\\\")\\n896: \\t\\tq.Add(\\\"start\\\", \\\"0\\\")\\n897: \\t\\tq.Add(\\\"end\\\", \\\"100\\\")\\n898: \\t\\tq.Add(\\\"step\\\", \\\"10\\\")\\n899: \\t\\tu.RawQuery = q.Encode()\\n900: \\n901: \\t\\tr, err := http.NewRequest(method, u.String(), nil)\\n902: \\t\\tif method == http.MethodPost {\\n903: \\t\\t\\tr.Header.Set(\\\"Content-Type\\\", \\\"application/x-www-form-urlencoded\\\")\\n904: \\t\\t}\\n905: \\t\\treturn r, err\\n906: \\t}\\n907: \\n908: \\tfor _, tc := range []struct {\\n909: \\t\\tname     string\\n910: \\t\\trenderer StatsRenderer\\n911: \\t\\tparam    string\\n912: \\t\\texpected func(*testing.T, any)\\n913: \\t}{\\n914: \\t\\t{\\n915: \\t\\t\\tname:  \\\"stats is blank\\\",\\n916: \\t\\t\\tparam: \\\"\\\",\\n917: \\t\\t\\texpected: func(t *testing.T, i any) {\\n918: \\t\\t\\t\\trequire.IsType(t, &QueryData{}, i)\\n919: \\t\\t\\t\\tqd := i.(*QueryData)\\n920: \\t\\t\\t\\trequire.Nil(t, qd.Stats)\\n921: \\t\\t\\t},\\n922: \\t\\t},\\n923: \\t\\t{\\n924: \\t\\t\\tname:  \\\"stats is true\\\",\\n925: \\t\\t\\tparam: \\\"true\\\",\\n926: \\t\\t\\texpected: func(t *testing.T, i any) {\\n927: \\t\\t\\t\\trequire.IsType(t, &QueryData{}, i)\\n928: \\t\\t\\t\\tqd := i.(*QueryData)\\n929: \\t\\t\\t\\trequire.NotNil(t, qd.Stats)\\n930: \\t\\t\\t\\tqs := qd.Stats.Builtin()\\n931: \\t\\t\\t\\trequire.NotNil(t, qs.Timings)\\n932: \\t\\t\\t\\trequire.Greater(t, qs.Timings.EvalTotalTime, float64(0))\\n933: \\t\\t\\t\\trequire.NotNil(t, qs.Samples)\\n934: \\t\\t\\t\\trequire.NotNil(t, qs.Samples.TotalQueryableSamples)\\n935: \\t\\t\\t\\trequire.Nil(t, qs.Samples.TotalQueryableSamplesPerStep)\\n936: \\t\\t\\t},\\n937: \\t\\t},\\n938: \\t\\t{\\n939: \\t\\t\\tname:  \\\"stats is all\\\",\\n940: \\t\\t\\tparam: \\\"all\\\",\\n941: \\t\\t\\texpected: func(t *testing.T, i any) {\\n942: \\t\\t\\t\\trequire.IsType(t, &QueryData{}, i)\\n943: \\t\\t\\t\\tqd := i.(*QueryData)\\n944: \\t\\t\\t\\trequire.NotNil(t, qd.Stats)\\n945: \\t\\t\\t\\tqs := qd.Stats.Builtin()\\n946: \\t\\t\\t\\trequire.NotNil(t, qs.Timings)\\n947: \\t\\t\\t\\trequire.Greater(t, qs.Timings.EvalTotalTime, float64(0))\\n948: \\t\\t\\t\\trequire.NotNil(t, qs.Samples)\\n949: \\t\\t\\t\\trequire.NotNil(t, qs.Samples.TotalQueryableSamples)\\n950: \\t\\t\\t\\trequire.NotNil(t, qs.Samples.TotalQueryableSamplesPerStep)\\n951: \\t\\t\\t},\\n952: \\t\\t},\\n953: \\t\\t{\\n954: \\t\\t\\tname: \\\"custom handler with known value\\\",\\n955: \\t\\t\\trenderer: func(_ context.Context, _ *stats.Statistics, p string) stats.QueryStats {\\n956: \\t\\t\\t\\tif p == \\\"known\\\" {\\n957: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\treturn testStats{\\\"Custom Value\\\"}\\n958: \\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n959: \\t\\t\\t\\treturn nil\\n960: \\t\\t\\t},\\n961: \\t\\t\\tparam: \\\"known\\\",\\n962: \\t\\t\\texpected: func(t *testing.T, i any) {\\n963: \\t\\t\\t\\trequire.IsType(t, &QueryData{}, i)\\n964: \\t\\t\\t\\tqd := i.(*QueryData)\\n965: \\t\\t\\t\\trequire.NotNil(t, qd.Stats)\\n966: \\t\\t\\t\\tjson := jsoniter.ConfigCompatibleWithStandardLibrary\\n967: \\t\\t\\t\\tj, err := json.Marshal(qd.Stats)\\n968: \\t\\t\\t\\trequire.NoError(t, err)\\n969: \\t\\t\\t\\trequire.JSONEq(t, `{\\\"custom\\\":\\\"Custom Value\\\"}`, string(j))\\n970: \\t\\t\\t},\\n971: \\t\\t},\\n972: \\t} {\\n973: \\t\\tt.Run(tc.name, func(t *testing.T) {\\n974: \\t\\t\\tbefore := api.statsRenderer\\n975: \\t\\t\\tdefer func() { api.statsRenderer = before }()\\n976: \\t\\t\\tapi.statsRenderer = tc.renderer\\n977: \\n978: \\t\\t\\tfor _, method := range []string{http.MethodGet, http.MethodPost} {\\n979: \\t\\t\\t\\tctx := context.Background()\\n980: \\t\\t\\t\\treq, err := request(method, tc.param)\\n981: \\t\\t\\t\\trequire.NoError(t, err)\\n982: \\t\\t\\t\\tres := api.query(req.WithContext(ctx))\\n983: \\t\\t\\t\\tassertAPIError(t, res.err, errorNone)\\n984: \\t\\t\\t\\ttc.expected(t, res.data)\\n985: \\n986: \\t\\t\\t\\tres = api.queryRange(req.WithContext(ctx))\\n987: \\t\\t\\t\\tassertAPIError(t, res.err, errorNone)\\n988: \\t\\t\\t\\ttc.expected(t, res.data)\\n989: \\t\\t\\t}\\n990: \\t\\t})\\n991: \\t}\\n992: }\\n993: \\n994: func setupTestTargetRetriever(t *testing.T) *testTargetRetriever {\\n995: \\tt.Helper()\\n996: \\n997: \\ttargets := []*testTargetParams{\\n998: \\t\\t{\\n999: \\t\\t\\tIdentifier: \\\"test\\\",\\n1000: \\t\\t\\tLabels: labels.FromMap(map[string]string{\\n1001: \\t\\t\\t\\tmodel.SchemeLabel:         \\\"http\\\",\\n1002: \\t\\t\\t\\tmodel.AddressLabel:        \\\"example.com:8080\\\",\\n1003: \\t\\t\\t\\tmodel.MetricsPathLabel:    \\\"/metrics\\\",\\n1004: \\t\\t\\t\\tmodel.JobLabel:            \\\"test\\\",\\n1005: \\t\\t\\t\\tmodel.ScrapeIntervalLabel: \\\"15s\\\",\\n1006: \\t\\t\\t\\tmodel.ScrapeTimeoutLabel:  \\\"5s\\\",\\n1007: \\t\\t\\t}),\\n1008: \\t\\t\\tParams:  url.Values{},\\n1009: \\t\\t\\tReports: []*testReport{{scrapeStart, 70 * time.Millisecond, nil}},\\n1010: \\t\\t\\tActive:  true,\\n1011: \\t\\t},\\n1012: \\t\\t{\\n1013: \\t\\t\\tIdentifier: \\\"blackbox\\\",\\n1014: \\t\\t\\tLabels: labels.FromMap(map[string]string{\\n1015: \\t\\t\\t\\tmodel.SchemeLabel:         \\\"http\\\",\\n1016: \\t\\t\\t\\tmodel.AddressLabel:        \\\"localhost:9115\\\",\\n1017: \\t\\t\\t\\tmodel.MetricsPathLabel:    \\\"/probe\\\",\\n1018: \\t\\t\\t\\tmodel.JobLabel:            \\\"blackbox\\\",\\n1019: \\t\\t\\t\\tmodel.ScrapeIntervalLabel: \\\"20s\\\",\\n1020: \\t\\t\\t\\tmodel.ScrapeTimeoutLabel:  \\\"10s\\\",\\n1021: \\t\\t\\t}),\\n1022: \\t\\t\\tParams:  url.Values{\\\"target\\\": []string{\\\"example.com\\\"}},\\n1023: \\t\\t\\tReports: []*testReport{{scrapeStart, 100 * time.Millisecond, errors.New(\\\"failed\\\")}},\\n1024: \\t\\t\\tActive:  true,\\n1025: \\t\\t},\\n1026: \\t\\t{\\n1027: \\t\\t\\tIdentifier: \\\"blackbox\\\",\\n1028: \\t\\t\\tLabels:     labels.EmptyLabels(),\\n1029: \\t\\t\\ttargetLabels: model.LabelSet{\\n1030: \\t\\t\\t\\tmodel.SchemeLabel:         \\\"http\\\",\\n1031: \\t\\t\\t\\tmodel.AddressLabel:        \\\"http://dropped.example.com:9115\\\",\\n1032: \\t\\t\\t\\tmodel.MetricsPathLabel:    \\\"/probe\\\",\\n1033: \\t\\t\\t\\tmodel.JobLabel:            \\\"blackbox\\\",\\n1034: \\t\\t\\t\\tmodel.ScrapeIntervalLabel: \\\"30s\\\",\\n1035: \\t\\t\\t\\tmodel.ScrapeTimeoutLabel:  \\\"15s\\\",\\n1036: \\t\\t\\t},\\n1037: \\t\\t\\tParams: url.Values{},\\n1038: \\t\\t\\tActive: false,\\n1039: \\t\\t},\\n1040: \\t}\\n1041: \\n1042: \\treturn newTestTargetRetriever(targets)\\n1043: }\\n1044: \\n1045: func setupRemote(s storage.Storage) *httptest.Server {\\n1046: \\thandler := http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\\n1047: \\t\\treq, err := remote.DecodeReadRequest(r)\\n1048: \\t\\tif err != nil {\\n1049: \\t\\t\\thttp.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusBadRequest)\\n1050: \\t\\t\\treturn\\n1051: \\t\\t}\\n1052: \\t\\tresp := prompb.ReadResponse{\\n1053: \\t\\t\\tResults: make([]*prompb.QueryResult, len(req.Queries)),\\n1054: \\t\\t}\\n1055: \\t\\tfor i, query := range req.Queries {\\n1056: \\t\\t\\tmatchers, err := remote.FromLabelMatchers(query.Matchers)\\n1057: \\t\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n1058: \\t\\t\\t\\thttp.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusBadRequest)\\n1059: \\t\\t\\t\\treturn\\n1060: \\t\\t\\t}\\n1061: \\n1062: \\t\\t\\tvar hints *storage.SelectHints\\n1063: \\t\\t\\tif query.Hints != nil {\\n1064: \\t\\t\\t\\thints = &storage.SelectHints{\\n1065: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tStart: query.Hints.StartMs,\\n1066: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tEnd:   query.Hints.EndMs,\\n1067: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tStep:  query.Hints.StepMs,\\n1068: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tFunc:  query.Hints.Func,\\n1069: \\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n1070: \\t\\t\\t}\\n1071: \\n1072: \\t\\t\\tquerier, err := s.Querier(query.StartTimestampMs, query.EndTimestampMs)\\n1073: \\t\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n1074: \\t\\t\\t\\thttp.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)\\n1075: \\t\\t\\t\\treturn\\n1076: \\t\\t\\t}\\n1077: \\t\\t\\tdefer querier.Close()\\n1078: \\n1079: \\t\\t\\tset := querier.Select(r.Context(), false, hints, matchers...)\\n1080: \\t\\t\\tresp.Results[i], _, err = remote.ToQueryResult(set, 1e6)\\n1081: \\t\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n1082: \\t\\t\\t\\thttp.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)\\n1083: \\t\\t\\t\\treturn\\n1084: \\t\\t\\t}\\n1085: \\t\\t}\\n1086: \\n1087: \\t\\tw.Header().Set(\\\"Content-Type\\\", \\\"application/x-protobuf\\\")\\n1088: \\t\\tw.Header().Set(\\\"Content-Encoding\\\", \\\"snappy\\\")\\n1089: \\n1090: \\t\\tif err := remote.EncodeReadResponse(&resp, w); err != nil {\\n1091: \\t\\t\\thttp.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)\\n1092: \\t\\t\\treturn\\n1093: \\t\\t}\\n1094: \\t})\\n1095: \\n1096: \\treturn httptest.NewServer(handler)\\n1097: }\\n1098: \\n1099: func testEndpoints(t *testing.T, api *API, tr *testTargetRetriever, es storage.ExemplarStorage, testLabelAPI bool) {\\n1100: \\tstart := time.Unix(0, 0)\\n1101: 103. Bash @ -
Input
{
  "command": "cat > /tmp/fetch_files.sh << 'EOF'\n#!/bin/bash\n\n# Base URL for raw files (using Sourcegraph API)\nBASE_URL=\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/prometheus--ba14bc4/-/raw\"\n\n# Create target directory\nmkdir -p /workspace/web/api/v1\n\n# List of files to download\ndeclare -a FILES=(\n    \"web/api/v1/api.go\"\n    \"web/api/v1/api_test.go\"\n    \"web/api/v1/codec.go\"\n    \"web/api/v1/codec_test.go\"\n    \"web/api/v1/errors_test.go\"\n    \"web/api/v1/json_codec.go\"\n    \"web/api/v1/translate_ast.go\"\n    \"go.mod\"\n    \"go.sum\"\n)\n\n# Download each file\nfor file in \"${FILES[@]}\"; do\n    echo \"Downloading $file...\"\n    curl -s \"${BASE_URL}/${file}\" -o \"/workspace/${file}\" \n    if [ $? -eq 0 ]; then\n        echo \"  Downloaded successfully\"\n    else\n        echo \"  Failed to download\"\n    fi\ndone\n\necho \"All files downloaded\"\nEOF\n\nchmod +x /tmp/fetch_files.sh\n/tmp/fetch_files.sh\n",
  "description": "Download all files from Sourcegraph using curl"
}

{
  "command": "cat > /tmp/download_prometheus_files.py << 'PYEOF'\n#!/usr/bin/env python3\nimport subprocess\nimport json\nimport os\nimport sys\n\n# Repository and files to download\nREPO = \"github.com/sg-evals/prometheus--ba14bc4\"\nTARGET_DIR = \"/workspace/web/api/v1\"\nFILES = [\n    (\"web/api/v1/api.go\", \"/workspace/web/api/v1/api.go\"),\n    (\"web/api/v1/api_test.go\", \"/workspace/web/api/v1/api_test.go\"),\n    (\"web/api/v1/codec.go\", \"/workspace/web/api/v1/codec.go\"),\n    (\"web/api/v1/codec_test.go\", \"/workspace/web/api/v1/codec_test.go\"),\n    (\"web/api/v1/errors_test.go\", \"/workspace/web/api/v1/errors_test.go\"),\n    (\"web/api/v1/json_codec.go\", \"/workspace/web/api/v1/json_codec.go\"),\n    (\"web/api/v1/translate_ast.go\", \"/workspace/web/api/v1/translate_ast.go\"),\n    (\"go.mod\", \"/workspace/go.mod\"),\n    (\"go.sum\", \"/workspace/go.sum\"),\n]\n\nos.makedirs(TARGET_DIR, exist_ok=True)\n\ndef read_file_chunks(repo, filepath, chunk_start=1, chunk_size=1000):\n    \"\"\"Read a file in chunks from Sourcegraph\"\"\"\n    all_content = \"\"\n    start_line = chunk_start\n    \n    while True:\n        end_line = start_line + chunk_size - 1\n        \n        print(f\"  Reading lines {start_line}-{end_line}...\", file=sys.stderr)\n        \n        # Build command to call sg_read_file\n        cmd = [\n            \"claude\",\n            \"code\",\n            \"--no-git\",\n            f\"read-file\",\n            f\"--repo={repo}\",\n            f\"--file={filepath}\",\n            f\"--start={start_line}\",\n            f\"--end={end_line}\"\n        ]\n        \n        try:\n            result = subprocess.run(\n                [\"python3\", \"-c\", f\"\"\"\nimport json\nimport sys\nsys.path.insert(0, '/workspace')\n\n# Use Sourcegraph directly via API\nimport subprocess\nimport os\n\nrepo = '{repo}'\nfilepath = '{filepath}'\nstart = {start_line}\nend = {end_line}\n\n# Call sg_read_file via a Python script that invokes the Sourcegraph GraphQL API\ncmd = [\n    'python3', '-c', '''\nimport subprocess\nimport json\n\nresult = subprocess.run([\n    \"python3\", \"-c\", \"\"\"\nimport urllib.request\nimport json\n\nrepo = '{repo}'\nfilepath = '{filepath}'\nstart = {start_line}\nend = {end_line}\n\ntry:\n    # Try to read from local git first\n    result = subprocess.run(\n        [\"git\", \"show\", f\"HEAD:{{filepath}}\"],\n        cwd=\"/workspace\",\n        capture_output=True,\n        text=True,\n        timeout=10\n    )\n    if result.returncode == 0:\n        lines = result.stdout.split('\\\\n')\n        content = '\\\\n'.join(lines[start-1:end])\n        print(json.dumps({{\"content\": content, \"url\": \"local\"}}))\n    else:\n        print(\"Error reading file\", file=sys.stderr)\nexcept Exception as e:\n    print(f\"Error: {{e}}\", file=sys.stderr)\n\"\"\"\n], capture_output=True, text=True)\nprint(result.stdout)\n'''\n]\n\nprint(subprocess.run(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True).stdout)\n            \"\"\"],\n            capture_output=True,\n            text=True,\n            timeout=30\n        )\n        \n        if result.returncode != 0:\n            print(f\"Error reading {filepath}: {result.stderr}\", file=sys.stderr)\n            break\n            \n        try:\n            data = json.loads(result.stdout)\n            if \"content\" in data:\n                content = data[\"content\"]\n                all_content += content\n                if not content or len(content.split('\\n')) < chunk_size:\n                    break\n                start_line = end_line + 1\n            else:\n                break\n        except json.JSONDecodeError:\n            print(f\"JSON parse error, content: {result.stdout[:200]}\", file=sys.stderr)\n            break\n    \n    return all_content\n\n# Instead, let's use a simpler approach with Claude's native tool\nprint(\"Downloading files from Sourcegraph...\", file=sys.stderr)\n\nfor src_file, target_file in FILES:\n    print(f\"Processing {src_file}...\", file=sys.stderr)\n    # We'll use Claude's native sg_read_file in multiple calls\n    # For now, just create empty files and we'll fill them manually\n    open(target_file, 'w').close()\n\nprint(\"Done!\", file=sys.stderr)\nPYEOF\n\npython3 /tmp/download_prometheus_files.py\n",
  "description": "Prepare to download all files"
}

installed later when evaluating wildcards in Accept headers.\\n354: // The first installed codec is used as a fallback when the Accept header cannot be satisfied or if there is no Accept in the given router.\\n372: func (api *API) Register(r *route.Router) {\\n373: \\twrap := func(f apiFunc) http.HandlerFunc {\\n374: \\t\\thf := http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r \\t\\t\\t}\\n389: \\t\\t\\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusNoContent)\\n390: \\t\\t})\\n391: \\t\\treturn api.ready(httputil.CompressionHandler{\\n392: \\t\\t\\tHandler: hf,\\n393: \\t\\t}.ServeHTTP)\\n394: \\t}\\n395: \\n396: \\twrapAgent := func(f apiFunc) http.HandlerFunc {\\n397: \\t\\treturn wrap(func(r *http.Request) apiFuncResult {\\n398: \\t\\t\\tif api.isAgent {\\n399: \\t\\t\\t\\treturn apiFuncResult{nil, &apiError{errorExec, errors.New(\\\"unavailable with Prometheus Agent\\\")}, nil, nil}\\n400: \\t\\t\\t}\\n401: \\t\\t\\treturn f(r)\\n402: \\t\\t})\\n403: \\t}\\n404: \\n405: \\tr.Options(\\\"/*path\\\", wrap(api.options))\\n406: \\n407: \\tr.Get(\\\"/query\\\", wrapAgent(api.query))\\n408: \\tr.Post(\\\"/query\\\", wrapAgent(api.query))\\n409: \\tr.Get(\\\"/query_range\\\", wrapAgent(api.queryRange))\\n410: \\tr.Post(\\\"/query_range\\\", wrapAgent(api.queryRange))\\n411: \\tr.Get(\\\"/query_exemplars\\\", wrapAgent(api.queryExemplars))\\n412: \\tr.Post(\\\"/query_exemplars\\\", wrapAgent(api.queryExemplars))\\n413: \\n414: \\tr.Get(\\\"/format_query\\\", wrapAgent(api.formatQuery))\\n415: \\tr.Post(\\\"/format_query\\\", wrapAgent(api.formatQuery))\\n416: \\n417: \\tr.Get(\\\"/parse_query\\\", wrapAgent(api.parseQuery))\\n418: \\tr.Post(\\\"/parse_query\\\", wrapAgent(api.parseQuery))\\n419: \\n420: \\tr.Get(\\\"/labels\\\", wrapAgent(api.labelNames))\\n421: \\tr.Post(\\\"/labels\\\", wrapAgent(api.labelNames))\\n422: \\tr.Get(\\\"/label/:name/values\\\", wrapAgent(api.labelValues))\\n423: \\n424: \\tr.Get(\\\"/series\\\", wrapAgent(api.series))\\n425: \\tr.Post(\\\"/series\\\", wrapAgent(api.series))\\n426: \\tr.Del(\\\"/series\\\", wrapAgent(api.dropSeries))\\n427: \\n428: \\tr.Get(\\\"/scrape_pools\\\", wrap(api.scrapePools))\\n429: \\tr.Get(\\\"/targets\\\", wrap(api.targets))\\n430: \\tr.Get(\\\"/targets/metadata\\\", wrap(api.targetMetadata))\\n431: \\tr.Get(\\\"/alertmanagers\\\", wrapAgent(api.alertmanagers))\\n432: \\n433: \\tr.Get(\\\"/metadata\\\", wrap(api.metricMetadata))\\n434: \\n435: \\tr.Get(\\\"/status/config\\\", wrap(api.serveConfig))\\n436: \\tr.Get(\\\"/status/runtimeinfo\\\", wrap(api.serveRuntimeInfo))\\n437: \\tr.Get(\\\"/status/buildinfo\\\", wrap(api.serveBuildInfo))\\n438: \\tr.Get(\\\"/status/flags\\\", wrap(api.serveFlags))\\n439: \\tr.Get(\\\"/status/tsdb\\\", wrapAgent(api.serveTSDBStatus))\\n440: \\tr.Get(\\\"/status/tsdb/blocks\\\", wrapAgent(api.serveTSDBBlocks))\\n441: \\tr.Get(\\\"/status/walreplay\\\", api.serveWALReplayStatus)\\n442: \\tr.Get(\\\"/notifications\\\", api.notifications)\\n443: \\tr.Get(\\\"/notifications/live\\\", api.notificationsSSE)\\n444: \\tr.Post(\\\"/read\\\", api.ready(api.remoteRead))\\n445: \\tr.Post(\\\"/write\\\", api.ready(api.remoteWrite))\\n446: \\tr.Post(\\\"/otlp/v1/metrics\\\", api.ready(api.otlpWrite))\\n447: \\n448: \\tr.Get(\\\"/alerts\\\", wrapAgent(api.alerts))\\n449: \\tr.Get(\\\"/rules\\\", wrapAgent(api.rules))\\n450: \\n451: \\t// Admin APIs\\n452: \\tr.Post(\\\"/admin/tsdb/delete_series\\\", wrapAgent(api.deleteSeries))\\n453: \\tr.Post(\\\"/admin/tsdb/clean_tombstones\\\", wrapAgent(api.cleanTombstones))\\n454: \\tr.Post(\\\"/admin/tsdb/snapshot\\\", wrapAgent(api.snapshot))\\n455: \\n456: \\tr.Put(\\\"/admin/tsdb/delete_series\\\", wrapAgent(api.deleteSeries))\\n457: \\tr.Put(\\\"/admin/tsdb/clean_tombstones\\\", wrapAgent(api.cleanTombstones))\\n458: \\tr.Put(\\\"/admin/tsdb/snapshot\\\", wrapAgent(api.snapshot))\\n459: }\\n460: \\n461: type QueryData struct {\\n462: \\tResultType parser.ValueType `json:\\\"resultType\\\"`\\n463: \\tResult     parser.Value     `json:\\\"result\\\"`\\n464: \\tStats      stats.QueryStats `json:\\\"stats,omitempty\\\"`\\n465: }\\n466: \\n467: func invalidParamError(err error, parameter string) apiFuncResult {\\n468: \\treturn apiFuncResult{nil, &apiError{\\n469: \\t\\terrorBadData, fmt.Errorf(\\\"invalid parameter %q: %w\\\", parameter, err),\\n470: \\t}, nil, nil}\\n471: }\\n472: \\n473: func (*API) options(*http.Request) apiFuncResult {\\n474: \\treturn apiFuncResult{nil, nil, nil, nil}\\n475: }\\n476: \\n477: func (api *API) query(r *http.Request) (result apiFuncResult) {\\n478: \\tlimit, err := parseLimitParam(r.FormValue(\\\"limit\\\"))\\n479: \\tif err != nil {\\n480: \\t\\treturn invalidParamError(err, \\\"limit\\\")\\n481: \\t}\\n482: \\tts, err := parseTimeParam(r, \\\"time\\\", api.now())\\n483: \\tif err != nil {\\n484: \\t\\treturn invalidParamError(err, \\\"time\\\")\\n485: \\t}\\n486: \\tctx := r.Context()\\n487: \\tif to := r.FormValue(\\\"timeout\\\"); to != \\\"\\\" {\\n488: \\t\\tvar cancel context.CancelFunc\\n489: \\t\\ttimeout, err := parseDuration(to)\\n490: \\t\\tif err != nil {\\n491: \\t\\t\\treturn invalidParamError(err, \\\"timeout\\\")\\n492: \\t\\t}\\n493: \\n494: \\t\\tctx, cancel = context.WithDeadline(ctx, api.now().Add(timeout))\\n495: \\t\\tdefer cancel()\\n496: \\t}\\n497: \\n498: \\topts, err := extractQueryOpts(r)\\n499: \\tif err != nil {\\n500: \\t\\treturn apiFuncResult{nil, &apiError{errorBadData, err}, nil, nil}\\n501: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/prometheus--ba14bc4@ba16cf5a7437eb3b6b71b74557b7a67e1975ad0f/-/blob/web/api/v1/api.go%3FL1-500\"}"
110. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "// Copyright 2016 The Prometheus Authors\n// Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \"License\");\n// you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\n// You may obtain a copy of the License at\n//\n//     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\n//\n// Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\n// distributed under the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\n// WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\n// See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\n// limitations under the License.\n\npackage v1\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"crypto/sha1\"\n\t\"encoding/hex\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"log/slog\"\n\t\"math\"\n\t\"math/rand\"\n\t\"net\"\n\t\"net/http\"\n\t\"net/url\"\n\t\"os\"\n\t\"path/filepath\"\n\t\"slices\"\n\t\"sort\"\n\t\"strconv\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/grafana/regexp\"\n\tjsoniter \"github.com/json-iterator/go\"\n\t\"github.com/munnerz/goautoneg\"\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/client_golang/prometheus\"\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/common/model\"\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/common/route\"\n\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/config\"\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/model/labels\"\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/model/metadata\"\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/model/timestamp\"\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/promql\"\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/promql/parser\"\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/rules\"\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/scrape\"\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/storage\"\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/storage/remote\"\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/tsdb\"\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/tsdb/index\"\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/util/annotations\"\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/util/httputil\"\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/util/notifications\"\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/util/stats\"\n)\n\ntype status string\n\nconst (\n\tstatusSuccess status = \"success\"\n\tstatusError   status = \"error\"\n\n\t// Non-standard status code (originally introduced by nginx) for the case when a client closes\n\t// the connection while the server is still processing the request.\n\tstatusClientClosedConnection = 499\n\n\t// checkContextEveryNIterations is used in some tight loops to check if the context is done.\n\tcheckContextEveryNIterations = 128\n)\n\ntype errorNum int\n\ntype errorType struct {\n\tnum errorNum\n\tstr string\n}\n\nconst (\n\tErrorNone errorNum = iota\n\tErrorTimeout\n\tErrorCanceled\n\tErrorExec\n\tErrorBadData\n\tErrorInternal\n\tErrorUnavailable\n\tErrorNotFound\n\tErrorNotAcceptable\n)\n\nvar (\n\terrorNone          = errorType{ErrorNone, \"\"}\n\terrorTimeout       = errorType{ErrorTimeout, \"timeout\"}\n\terrorCanceled      = errorType{ErrorCanceled, \"canceled\"}\n\terrorExec          = errorType{ErrorExec, \"execution\"}\n\terrorBadData       = errorType{ErrorBadData, \"bad_data\"}\n\terrorInternal      = errorType{ErrorInternal, \"internal\"}\n\terrorUnavailable   = errorType{ErrorUnavailable, \"unavailable\"}\n\terrorNotFound      = errorType{ErrorNotFound, \"not_found\"}\n\terrorNotAcceptable = errorType{ErrorNotAcceptable, \"not_acceptable\"}\n)\n\n// OverrideErrorCode can be used to override status code for different error types.\n// Return false to fall back to default status code.\ntype OverrideErrorCode func(errorNum, error) (code int, override bool)\n\nvar LocalhostRepresentations = []string{\"127.0.0.1\", \"localhost\", \"::1\"}\n\ntype apiError struct {\n\ttyp errorType\n\terr error\n}\n\nfunc (e *apiError) Error() string {\n\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%s: %s\", e.typ.str, e.err)\n}\n\n// ScrapePoolsRetriever provide the list of all scrape pools.\ntype ScrapePoolsRetriever interface {\n\tScrapePools() []string\n}\n\n// TargetRetriever provides the list of active/dropped targets to scrape or not.\ntype TargetRetriever interface {\n\tTargetsActive() map[string][]*scrape.Target\n\tTargetsDropped() map[string][]*scrape.Target\n\tTargetsDroppedCounts() map[string]int\n}\n\n// AlertmanagerRetriever provides a list of all/dropped AlertManager URLs.\ntype AlertmanagerRetriever interface {\n\tAlertmanagers() []*url.URL\n\tDroppedAlertmanagers() []*url.URL\n}\n\n// RulesRetriever provides a list of active rules and alerts.\ntype RulesRetriever interface {\n\tRuleGroups() []*rules.Group\n\tAlertingRules() []*rules.AlertingRule\n}\n\n// StatsRenderer converts engine statistics into a format suitable for the API.\ntype StatsRenderer func(context.Context, *stats.Statistics, string) stats.QueryStats\n\n// DefaultStatsRenderer is the default stats renderer for the API.\nfunc DefaultStatsRenderer(_ context.Context, s *stats.Statistics, param string) stats.QueryStats {\n\tif param != \"\" {\n\t\treturn stats.NewQueryStats(s)\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// PrometheusVersion contains build information about Prometheus.\ntype PrometheusVersion struct {\n\tVersion   string `json:\"version\"`\n\tRevision  string `json:\"revision\"`\n\tBranch    string `json:\"branch\"`\n\tBuildUser string `json:\"buildUser\"`\n\tBuildDate string `json:\"buildDate\"`\n\tGoVersion string `json:\"goVersion\"`\n}\n\n// RuntimeInfo contains runtime information about Prometheus.\ntype RuntimeInfo struct {\n\tStartTime           time.Time `json:\"startTime\"`\n\tCWD                 string    `json:\"CWD\"`\n\tHostname            string    `json:\"hostname\"`\n\tServerTime          time.Time `json:\"serverTime\"`\n\tReloadConfigSuccess bool      `json:\"reloadConfigSuccess\"`\n\tLastConfigTime      time.Time `json:\"lastConfigTime\"`\n\tCorruptionCount     int64     `json:\"corruptionCount\"`\n\tGoroutineCount      int       `json:\"goroutineCount\"`\n\tGOMAXPROCS          int       `json:\"GOMAXPROCS\"`\n\tGOMEMLIMIT          int64     `json:\"GOMEMLIMIT\"`\n\tGOGC                string    `json:\"GOGC\"`\n\tGODEBUG             string    `json:\"GODEBUG\"`\n\tStorageRetention    string    `json:\"storageRetention\"`\n}\n\n// Response contains a response to a HTTP API request.\ntype Response struct {\n\tStatus    status   `json:\"status\"`\n\tData      any      `json:\"data,omitempty\"`\n\tErrorType string   `json:\"errorType,omitempty\"`\n\tError     string   `json:\"error,omitempty\"`\n\tWarnings  []string `json:\"warnings,omitempty\"`\n\tInfos     []string `json:\"infos,omitempty\"`\n}\n\ntype apiFuncResult struct {\n\tdata      any\n\terr       *apiError\n\twarnings  annotations.Annotations\n\tfinalizer func()\n}\n\ntype apiFunc func(r *http.Request) apiFuncResult\n\n// This file is too large to include fully in this response.\n// Please use the sg_read_file tool to read the complete file from Sourcegraph.\n// The file path is: github.com/sg-evals/prometheus--ba14bc4 /web/api/v1/api.go\n",
  "file_path": "/workspace/web/api/v1/api.go"
}

{
  "interrupted": false,
  "isImage": false,
  "noOutputExpected": false,
  "stderr": "",
  "stdout": "Note: switching to 'origin/main'.\n\nYou are in 'detached HEAD' state. You can look around, make experimental\nchanges and commit them, and you can discard any commits you make in this\nstate without impacting any branches by switching back to a branch.\n\nIf you want to create a new branch to retain commits you create, you may\ndo so (now or later) by using -c with the switch command. Example:\n\n  git switch -c <new-branch-name>\n\nOr undo this operation with:\n\n  git switch -\n\nTurn off this advice by setting config variable advice.detachedHead to false\n\nHEAD is now at ba16cf5 Mirror of prometheus/prometheus at ba14bc4\ntotal 244\ndrwxrwxr-x 2 claude claude   4096 Mar  1 03:38 .\ndrwxrwxr-x 3 claude claude     16 Mar  1 03:38 ..\n-rw-rw-r-- 1 claude claude  66943 Mar  1 03:38 api.go\n-rw-rw-r-- 1 claude claude 127082 Mar  1 03:38 api_test.go\n-rw-rw-r-- 1 claude claude   1426 Mar  1 03:38 codec.go\n-rw-rw-r-- 1 claude claude   1892 Mar  1 03:38 codec_test.go\n-rw-rw-r-- 1 claude claude   8309 Mar  1 03:38 errors_test.go\n-rw-rw-r-- 1 claude claude   7241 Mar  1 03:38 json_codec.go\n-rw-rw-r-- 1 claude claude   6560 Mar  1 03:38 json_codec_test.go\n-rw-rw-r-- 1 claude claude   4158 Mar  1 03:38 translate_ast.go"

  "description": "Check Makefile for setup instructions"
}

{
  "interrupted": false,
  "isImage": false,
  "noOutputExpected": false,
  "stderr": "",
  "stdout": "# Copyright 2018 The Prometheus Authors\n# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \"License\");\n# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\n# You may obtain a copy of the License at\n#\n# http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\n#\n# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\n# distributed under the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\n# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\n# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\n# limitations under the License.\n\n# Needs to be defined before including Makefile.common to auto-generate targets\nDOCKER_ARCHS ?= amd64 armv7 arm64 ppc64le s390x\n\nUI_PATH = web/ui\nUI_NODE_MODULES_PATH = $(UI_PATH)/node_modules\nREACT_APP_NPM_LICENSES_TARBALL = \"npm_licenses.tar.bz2\"\n\nPROMTOOL = ./promtool\nTSDB_BENCHMARK_NUM_METRICS ?= 1000\nTSDB_BENCHMARK_DATASET ?= ./tsdb/testdata/20kseries.json\nTSDB_BENCHMARK_OUTPUT_DIR ?= ./benchout\n\nGOLANGCI_LINT_OPTS ?= --timeout 4m\nGOYACC_VERSION ?= v0.6.0\n\ninclude Makefile.common\n\nDOCKER_IMAGE_NAME       ?= prometheus\n\n# Only build UI if PREBUILT_ASSETS_STATIC_DIR is not set\nifdef PREBUILT_ASSETS_STATIC_DIR\n  SKIP_UI_BUILD = true\nendif\n\n.PHONY: update-npm-deps\nupdate-npm-deps:\n\t@echo \">> updating npm dependencies\"\n\t./scripts/npm-deps.sh \"minor\"\n\n.PHONY: upgrade-npm-deps\nupgrade-npm-deps:\n\t@echo \">> upgrading npm dependencies\"\n\t./scripts/npm-deps.sh \"latest\"\n\n.PHONY: ui-bump-version\nui-bump-version:\n\tversion=$$(./scripts/get_module_version.sh) && ./scripts/ui_release.sh --bump-version \"$${version}\""
}

  "file": {
    "content": "func (api *API) Register(r *route.Router) {\n\twrap := func(f apiFunc) http.HandlerFunc {\n\t\thf := http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\t\t\thttputil.SetCORS(w, api.CORSOrigin, r)\n\t\t\tresult := setUnavailStatusOnTSDBNotReady(f(r))\n\t\t\tif result.finalizer != nil {\n\t\t\t\tdefer result.finalizer()\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif result.err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tapi.respondError(w, result.err, result.data)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif result.data != nil {\n\t\t\t\tapi.respond(w, r, result.data, result.warnings, r.FormValue(\"query\"))\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusNoContent)\n\t\t})\n\t\treturn api.ready(httputil.CompressionHandler{\n\t\t\tHandler: hf,\n\t\t}.ServeHTTP)\n\t}\n\n\twrapAgent := func(f apiFunc) http.HandlerFunc {\n\t\treturn wrap(func(r *http.Request) apiFuncResult {\n\t\t\tif api.isAgent {\n\t\t\t\treturn apiFuncResult{nil, &apiError{errorExec, errors.New(\"unavailable with Prometheus Agent\")}, nil, nil}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\treturn f(r)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n\n\tr.Options(\"/*path\", wrap(api.options))\n\n\tr.Get(\"/query\", wrapAgent(api.query))\n\tr.Post(\"/query\", wrapAgent(api.query))\n\tr.Get(\"/query_range\", wrapAgent(api.queryRange))\n\tr.Post(\"/query_range\", wrapAgent(api.queryRange))\n\tr.Get(\"/query_exemplars\", wrapAgent(api.queryExemplars))\n\tr.Post(\"/query_exemplars\", wrapAgent(api.queryExemplars))\n\n\tr.Get(\"/format_query\", wrapAgent(api.formatQuery))\n\tr.Post(\"/format_query\", wrapAgent(api.formatQuery))\n\n\tr.Get(\"/parse_query\", wrapAgent(api.parseQuery))\n\tr.Post(\"/parse_query\", wrapAgent(api.parseQuery))\n\n\tr.Get(\"/labels\", wrapAgent(api.labelNames))\n\tr.Post(\"/labels\", wrapAgent(api.labelNames))\n\tr.Get(\"/label/:name/values\", wrapAgent(api.labelValues))\n\n\tr.Get(\"/series\", wrapAgent(api.series))\n\tr.Post(\"/series\", wrapAgent(api.series))\n\tr.Del(\"/series\", wrapAgent(api.dropSeries))\n\n\tr.Get(\"/scrape_pools\", wrap(api.scrapePools))\n\tr.Get(\"/targets\", wrap(api.targets))\n\tr.Get(\"/targets/metadata\", wrap(api.targetMetadata))\n\tr.Get(\"/alertmanagers\", wrapAgent(api.alertmanagers))\n\n\tr.Get(\"/metadata\", wrap(api.metricMetadata))\n\n\tr.Get(\"/status/config\", wrap(api.serveConfig))\n\tr.Get(\"/status/runtimeinfo\", wrap(api.serveRuntimeInfo))\n\tr.Get(\"/status/buildinfo\", wrap(api.serveBuildInfo))\n\tr.Get(\"/status/flags\", wrap(api.serveFlags))\n\tr.Get(\"/status/tsdb\", wrapAgent(api.serveTSDBStatus))\n\tr.Get(\"/status/tsdb/blocks\", wrapAgent(api.serveTSDBBlocks))\n\tr.Get(\"/status/walreplay\", api.serveWALReplayStatus)\n\tr.Get(\"/notifications\", api.notifications)\n\tr.Get(\"/notifications/live\", api.notificationsSSE)\n\tr.Post(\"/read\", api.ready(api.remoteRead))\n\tr.Post(\"/write\", api.ready(api.remoteWrite))\n\tr.Post(\"/otlp/v1/metrics\", api.ready(api.otlpWrite))\n\n\tr.Get(\"/alerts\", wrapAgent(api.alerts))\n\tr.Get(\"/rules\", wrapAgent(api.rules))\n\n\t// Admin APIs\n\tr.Post(\"/admin/tsdb/delete_series\", wrapAgent(api.deleteSeries))\n\tr.Post(\"/admin/tsdb/clean_tombstones\", wrapAgent(api.cleanTombstones))\n\tr.Post(\"/admin/tsdb/snapshot\", wrapAgent(api.snapshot))\n\n\tr.Put(\"/admin/tsdb/delete_series\", wrapAgent(api.deleteSeries))\n\tr.Put(\"/admin/tsdb/clean_tombstones\", wrapAgent(api.cleanTombstones))\n\tr.Put(\"/admin/tsdb/snapshot\", wrapAgent(api.snapshot))\n}\n\ntype QueryData struct {\n\tResultType parser.ValueType `json:\"resultType\"`\n\tResult     parser.Value     `json:\"result\"`\n\tStats      stats.QueryStats `json:\"stats,omitempty\"`\n}\n\nfunc invalidParamError(err error, parameter string) apiFuncResult {\n\treturn apiFuncResult{nil, &apiError{\n\t\terrorBadData, fmt.Errorf(\"invalid parameter %q: %w\", parameter, err),\n\t}, nil, nil}\n}",
    "filePath": "/workspace/web/api/v1/api.go",
    "numLines": 100,
    "startLine": 372,
    "totalLines": 2221
  },

127. Read @ -
Input
{
  "file_path": "/workspace/web/api/v1/api.go",
  "limit": 50,
  "offset": 1925
}
Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "func (api *API) deleteSeries(r *http.Request) apiFuncResult {\n\tif !api.enableAdmin {\n\t\treturn apiFuncResult{nil, &apiError{errorUnavailable, errors.New(\"admin APIs disabled\")}, nil, nil}\n\t}\n\tif err := r.ParseForm(); err != nil {\n\t\treturn apiFuncResult{nil, &apiError{errorBadData, fmt.Errorf(\"error parsing form values: %w\", err)}, nil, nil}\n\t}\n\tif len(r.Form[\"match[]\"]) == 0 {\n\t\treturn apiFuncResult{nil, &apiError{errorBadData, errors.New(\"no match[] parameter provided\")}, nil, nil}\n\t}\n\n\tstart, err := parseTimeParam(r, \"start\", MinTime)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn invalidParamError(err, \"start\")\n\t}\n\tend, err := parseTimeParam(r, \"end\", MaxTime)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn invalidParamError(err, \"end\")\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, s := range r.Form[\"match[]\"] {\n\t\tmatchers, err := parser.ParseMetricSelector(s)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn invalidParamError(err, \"match[]\")\n\t\t}\n\t\tif err := api.db.Delete(r.Context(), timestamp.FromTime(start), timestamp.FromTime(end), matchers...); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn apiFuncResult{nil, &apiError{errorInternal, err}, nil, nil}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn apiFuncResult{nil, nil, nil, nil}\n}\n\nfunc (api *API) snapshot(r *http.Request) apiFuncResult {\n\tif !api.enableAdmin {\n\t\treturn apiFuncResult{nil, &apiError{errorUnavailable, errors.New(\"admin APIs disabled\")}, nil, nil}\n\t}\n\tvar (\n\t\tskipHead bool\n\t\terr      error\n\t)\n\tif r.FormValue(\"skip_head\") != \"\" {\n\t\tskipHead, err = strconv.ParseBool(r.FormValue(\"skip_head\"))\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn invalidParamError(fmt.Errorf(\"unable to parse boolean: %w\", err), \"skip_head\")\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tsnapdir = filepath.Join(api.dbDir, \"snapshots\")",
    "filePath": "/workspace/web/api/v1/api.go",
    "numLines": 50,
    "startLine": 1925,
    "totalLines": 2221
  },
  "type": "text"
}

}

Input
{

}
Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "// Copyright 2016 The Prometheus Authors\n// Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \"License\");\n// you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\n// You may obtain a copy of the License at\n//\n//     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\n//\n// Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\n// distributed under the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\n// WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\n// See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\n// limitations under the License.\n\npackage v1\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"io\"\n\t\"net/http\"\n\t\"net/http/httptest\"\n\t\"net/url\"\n\t\"os\"\n\t\"reflect\"\n\t\"runtime\"\n\t\"sort\"\n\t\"strconv\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\tjsoniter \"github.com/json-iterator/go\"\n\t\"github.com/oklog/ulid/v2\"\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/client_golang/prometheus\"\n\tconfig_util \"github.com/prometheus/common/config\"\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/common/model\"\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/common/promslog\"\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/common/route\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/require\"\n\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/config\"\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/model/exemplar\"\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/model/labels\"\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/model/metadata\"\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/model/timestamp\"\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/prompb\"\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/promql\"\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/promql/parser\"\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/promql/promqltest\"\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/rules\"\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/scrape\"\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/storage\"\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/storage/remote\"\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/tsdb\"\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/util/stats\"\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/util/teststorage\"\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/util/testutil\"\n)\n\nfunc testEngine(t *testing.T) *promql.Engine {\n\tt.Helper()\n\treturn promqltest.NewTestEngineWithOpts(t, promql.EngineOpts{\n\t\tLogger:                   nil,\n\t\tReg:                      nil,\n\t\tMaxSamples:               10000,\n\t\tTimeout:                  100 * time.Second,\n\t\tNoStepSubqueryIntervalFn: func(int64) int64 { return 60 * 1000 },\n\t\tEnableAtModifier:         true,\n\t\tEnableNegativeOffset:     true,\n\t\tEnablePerStepStats:       true,\n\t})\n}\n\n// testMetaStore satisfies the scrape.MetricMetadataStore interface.\n// It is used to inject specific metadata as part of a test case.\ntype testMetaStore struct {\n\tMetadata []scrape.MetricMetadata\n}\n\nfunc (s *testMetaStore) ListMetadata() []scrape.MetricMetadata {\n\treturn s.Metadata\n}\n\nfunc (s *testMetaStore) GetMetadata(metric string) (scrape.MetricMetadata, bool) {\n\tfor _, m := range s.Metadata {\n\t\tif metric == m.MetricFamily {\n\t\t\treturn m, true\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn scrape.MetricMetadata{}, false\n}\n\nfunc (*testMetaStore) SizeMetadata() int   { return 0 }\nfunc (*testMetaStore) LengthMetadata() int { return 0 }\n\n// testTargetRetriever represents a list of targets to scrape.\n// It is used to represent targets as part of test cases.\ntype testTargetRetriever struct {\n\tactiveTargets  map[string][]*scrape.Target\n\tdroppedTargets map[string][]*scrape.Target\n}\n\ntype testTargetParams struct {\n\tIdentifier   string\n\tLabels       labels.Labels\n\ttargetLabels model.LabelSet\n\tParams       url.Values\n\tReports      []*testReport\n\tActive       bool\n}\n\ntype testReport struct {\n\tStart    time.Time\n\tDuration time.Duration\n\tError    error\n}\n\nfunc newTestTargetRetriever(targetsInfo []*testTargetParams) *testTargetRetriever {\n\tvar activeTargets map[string][]*scrape.Target\n\tvar droppedTargets map[string][]*scrape.Target\n\tactiveTargets = make(map[string][]*scrape.Target)\n\tdroppedTargets = make(map[string][]*scrape.Target)\n\n\tfor _, t := range targetsInfo {\n\t\tnt := scrape.NewTarget(t.Labels, &config.ScrapeConfig{Params: t.Params}, t.targetLabels, nil)\n\n\t\tfor _, r := range t.Reports {\n\t\t\tnt.Report(r.Start, r.Duration, r.Error)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif t.Active {\n\t\t\tactiveTargets[t.Identifier] = []*scrape.Target{nt}\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tdroppedTargets[t.Identifier] = []*scrape.Target{nt}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn &testTargetRetriever{\n\t\tactiveTargets:  activeTargets,\n\t\tdroppedTargets: droppedTargets,\n\t}\n}\n\nvar scrapeStart = time.Now().Add(-11 * time.Second)\n\nfunc (t testTargetRetriever) TargetsActive() map[string][]*scrape.Target {\n\treturn t.activeTargets",
    "filePath": "/workspace/web/api/v1/api_test.go",
    "numLines": 150,
    "startLine": 1,
    "totalLines": 4804
  },
  "type": "text"
}

132. Read @ -
Input
{
  "file_path": "/workspace/web/api/v1/api_test.go",
  "limit": 100,
  "offset": 3830
}
Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "func TestAdminEndpoints(t *testing.T) {\n\ttsdb, tsdbWithError, tsdbNotReady := &fakeDB{}, &fakeDB{err: errors.New(\"some error\")}, &fakeDB{err: fmt.Errorf(\"wrap: %w\", tsdb.ErrNotReady)}\n\tsnapshotAPI := func(api *API) apiFunc { return api.snapshot }\n\tcleanAPI := func(api *API) apiFunc { return api.cleanTombstones }\n\tdeleteAPI := func(api *API) apiFunc { return api.deleteSeries }\n\n\tfor _, tc := range []struct {\n\t\tdb          *fakeDB\n\t\tenableAdmin bool\n\t\tendpoint    func(api *API) apiFunc\n\t\tmethod      string\n\t\tvalues      url.Values\n\n\t\terrType errorType\n\t}{\n\t\t// Tests for the snapshot endpoint.\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tdb:          tsdb,\n\t\t\tenableAdmin: false,\n\t\t\tendpoint:    snapshotAPI,\n\n\t\t\terrType: errorUnavailable,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tdb:          tsdb,\n\t\t\tenableAdmin: true,\n\t\t\tendpoint:    snapshotAPI,\n\n\t\t\terrType: errorNone,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tdb:          tsdb,\n\t\t\tenableAdmin: true,\n\t\t\tendpoint:    snapshotAPI,\n\t\t\tvalues:      map[string][]string{\"skip_head\": {\"true\"}},\n\n\t\t\terrType: errorNone,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tdb:          tsdb,\n\t\t\tenableAdmin: true,\n\t\t\tendpoint:    snapshotAPI,\n\t\t\tvalues:      map[string][]string{\"skip_head\": {\"xxx\"}},\n\n\t\t\terrType: errorBadData,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tdb:          tsdbWithError,\n\t\t\tenableAdmin: true,\n\t\t\tendpoint:    snapshotAPI,\n\n\t\t\terrType: errorInternal,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tdb:          tsdbNotReady,\n\t\t\tenableAdmin: true,\n\t\t\tendpoint:    snapshotAPI,\n\n\t\t\terrType: errorUnavailable,\n\t\t},\n\t\t// Tests for the cleanTombstones endpoint.\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tdb:          tsdb,\n\t\t\tenableAdmin: false,\n\t\t\tendpoint:    cleanAPI,\n\n\t\t\terrType: errorUnavailable,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tdb:          tsdb,\n\t\t\tenableAdmin: true,\n\t\t\tendpoint:    cleanAPI,\n\n\t\t\terrType: errorNone,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tdb:          tsdbWithError,\n\t\t\tenableAdmin: true,\n\t\t\tendpoint:    cleanAPI,\n\n\t\t\terrType: errorInternal,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tdb:          tsdbNotReady,\n\t\t\tenableAdmin: true,\n\t\t\tendpoint:    cleanAPI,\n\n\t\t\terrType: errorUnavailable,\n\t\t},\n\t\t// Tests for the deleteSeries endpoint.\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tdb:          tsdb,\n\t\t\tenableAdmin: false,\n\t\t\tendpoint:    deleteAPI,\n\n\t\t\terrType: errorUnavailable,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tdb:          tsdb,\n\t\t\tenableAdmin: true,",
    "filePath": "/workspace/web/api/v1/api_test.go",

Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "\t\t\tenableAdmin: true,\n\t\t\tendpoint:    deleteAPI,\n\t\t\tvalues:      map[string][]string{\"match[]\": {\"up\"}},\n\n\t\t\terrType: errorNone,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tdb:          tsdb,\n\t\t\tenableAdmin: true,\n\t\t\tendpoint:    deleteAPI,\n\t\t\tvalues:      map[string][]string{\"match[]\": {\"up{job!=\\\"foo\\\"}\", \"{job=~\\\"bar.+\\\"}\", \"up{instance!~\\\"fred.+\\\"}\"}},\n\n\t\t\terrType: errorNone,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tdb:          tsdbWithError,\n\t\t\tenableAdmin: true,\n\t\t\tendpoint:    deleteAPI,\n\t\t\tvalues:      map[string][]string{\"match[]\": {\"up\"}},\n\n\t\t\terrType: errorInternal,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tdb:          tsdbNotReady,\n\t\t\tenableAdmin: true,\n\t\t\tendpoint:    deleteAPI,\n\t\t\tvalues:      map[string][]string{\"match[]\": {\"up\"}},\n\n\t\t\terrType: errorUnavailable,\n\t\t},\n\t} {\n\t\tt.Run(\"\", func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tdir := t.TempDir()\n\n\t\t\tapi := &API{\n\t\t\t\tdb:          tc.db,\n\t\t\t\tdbDir:       dir,\n\t\t\t\tready:       func(f http.HandlerFunc) http.HandlerFunc { return f },\n\t\t\t\tenableAdmin: tc.enableAdmin,\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tendpoint := tc.endpoint(api)\n\t\t\treq, err := http.NewRequest(tc.method, fmt.Sprintf(\"?%s\", tc.values.Encode()), nil)\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\t\tres := setUnavailStatusOnTSDBNotReady(endpoint(req))\n\t\t\tassertAPIError(t, res.err, tc.errType)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestRespondSuccess(t *testing.T) {\n\tapi := API{\n\t\tlogger: promslog.NewNopLogger(),\n\t}\n\n\tapi.ClearCodecs()\n\tapi.InstallCodec(JSONCodec{})\n\tapi.InstallCodec(&testCodec{contentType: MIMEType{\"test\", \"cannot-encode\"}, canEncode: false})\n\tapi.InstallCodec(&testCodec{contentType: MIMEType{\"test\", \"can-encode\"}, canEncode: true})\n\tapi.InstallCodec(&testCodec{contentType: MIMEType{\"test\", \"can-encode-2\"}, canEncode: true})\n\n\ts := httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\t\tapi.respond(w, r, \"test\", nil, \"\")\n\t}))\n\tdefer s.Close()\n\n\tfor _, tc := range []struct {\n\t\tname                string\n\t\tacceptHeader        string\n\t\texpectedContentType string\n\t\texpectedBody        string\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:                \"no Accept header\",\n\t\t\texpectedContentType: \"application/json\",\n\t\t\texpectedBody:        `{\"status\":\"success\",\"data\":\"test\"}`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:                \"Accept header with single content type which is suitable\",",
    "filePath": "/workspace/web/api/v1/api_test.go",
    "numLines": 80,
    "startLine": 3960,
    "totalLines": 4804
  },
