134. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "// Copyright 2016 The Prometheus Authors\n// Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \"License\");\n// you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\n// You may obtain a copy of the License at\n//\n//     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\n//\n// Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\n// distributed under the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\n// WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\n// See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\n// limitations under the License.\n\npackage v1\n\nimport (\n\t\"bytes\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"net/http\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/require\"\n)\n\n// SilenceMatcher represents a matcher for a silence.\ntype SilenceMatcher struct {\n\tName    string `json:\"name\"`\n\tValue   string `json:\"value\"`\n\tIsRegex bool   `json:\"isRegex\"`\n\tIsEqual bool   `json:\"isEqual\"`\n}\n\n// SilenceInput represents the input data for creating a silence.\ntype SilenceInput struct {\n\tMatchers  []SilenceMatcher `json:\"matchers\"`\n\tStartsAt  time.Time        `json:\"startsAt\"`\n\tEndsAt    time.Time        `json:\"endsAt\"`\n\tCreatedBy string           `json:\"createdBy\"`\n\tComment   string           `json:\"comment\"`\n}\n\n// BulkSilenceResponse represents the response for bulk silence creation.\ntype BulkSilenceResponse struct {\n\tSilenceIDs []string `json:\"silenceIDs\"`\n}\n\n// BulkSilenceError represents an error response for bulk silence creation.\ntype BulkSilenceErrorDetail struct {\n\tIndex   int    `json:\"index\"`\n\tMessage string `json:\"message\"`\n}\n\nfunc TestBulkSilencesSuccess(t *testing.T) {\n\tapi := &API{\n\t\tready: func(f http.HandlerFunc) http.HandlerFunc { return f },\n\t}\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tstartTime := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tendTime := now.Add(2 * time.Hour)\n\n\tsilences := []SilenceInput{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tMatchers: []SilenceMatcher{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"job\", Value: \"test\", IsRegex: false, IsEqual: true},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tStartsAt:  startTime,\n\t\t\tEndsAt:    endTime,\n\t\t\tCreatedBy: \"test-user\",\n\t\t\tComment:   \"Testing silence 1\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tMatchers: []SilenceMatcher{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"TestAlert\", IsRegex: false, IsEqual: true},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tStartsAt:  startTime,\n\t\t\tEndsAt:    endTime,\n\t\t\tCreatedBy: \"test-user\",\n\t\t\tComment:   \"Testing silence 2\",\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tbody, err := json.Marshal(silences)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\treq, err := http.NewRequest(http.MethodPost, \"/api/v1/silences/bulk\", bytes.NewReader(body))\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\treq.Header.Set(\"Content-Type\", \"application/json\")\n\n\tresult := api.bulkSilences(req)\n\trequire.Nil(t, result.err)\n\trequire.NotNil(t, result.data)\n\n\t// Check that we got the right number of silence IDs\n\tbulkResp, ok := result.data.(BulkSilenceResponse)\n\trequire.True(t, ok)\n\trequire.Len(t, bulkResp.SilenceIDs, 2)\n\n\t// Verify all IDs are non-empty\n\tfor _, id := range bulkResp.SilenceIDs {\n\t\trequire.NotEmpty(t, id)\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestBulkSilencesEmptyArray(t *testing.T) {\n\tapi := &API{\n\t\tready: func(f http.HandlerFunc) http.HandlerFunc { return f },\n\t}\n\n\tsilences := []SilenceInput{}\n\n\tbody, err := json.Marshal(silences)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\treq, err := http.NewRequest(http.MethodPost, \"/api/v1/silences/bulk\", bytes.NewReader(body))\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\treq.Header.Set(\"Content-Type\", \"application/json\")\n\n\tresult := api.bulkSilences(req)\n\trequire.Nil(t, result.err)\n\trequire.NotNil(t, result.data)\n\n\tbulkResp, ok := result.data.(BulkSilenceResponse)\n\trequire.True(t, ok)\n\trequire.Len(t, bulkResp.SilenceIDs, 0)\n}\n\nfunc TestBulkSilencesValidationFailure(t *testing.T) {\n\tapi := &API{\n\t\tready: func(f http.HandlerFunc) http.HandlerFunc { return f },\n\t}\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tstartTime := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tendTime := now.Add(2 * time.Hour)\n\n\t// Invalid silence: no matchers\n\tsilences := []SilenceInput{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tMatchers:  []SilenceMatcher{}, // Empty matchers - should fail validation\n\t\t\tStartsAt:  startTime,\n\t\t\tEndsAt:    endTime,\n\t\t\tCreatedBy: \"test-user\",\n\t\t\tComment:   \"Invalid silence\",\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tbody, err := json.Marshal(silences)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\treq, err := http.NewRequest(http.MethodPost, \"/api/v1/silences/bulk\", bytes.NewReader(body))\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\treq.Header.Set(\"Content-Type\", \"application/json\")\n\n\tresult := api.bulkSilences(req)\n\trequire.NotNil(t, result.err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, errorBadData, result.err.typ)\n}\n\nfunc TestBulkSilencesPartialValidationFailure(t *testing.T) {\n\tapi := &API{\n\t\tready: func(f http.HandlerFunc) http.HandlerFunc { return f },\n\t}\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tstartTime := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tendTime := now.Add(2 * time.Hour)\n\n\t// Second silence is invalid: endsAt is before startsAt\n\tsilences := []SilenceInput{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tMatchers: []SilenceMatcher{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"job\", Value: \"valid\", IsRegex: false, IsEqual: true},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tStartsAt:  startTime,\n\t\t\tEndsAt:    endTime,\n\t\t\tCreatedBy: \"test-user\",\n\t\t\tComment:   \"Valid silence\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tMatchers: []SilenceMatcher{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"job\", Value: \"invalid\", IsRegex: false, IsEqual: true},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tStartsAt:  endTime,     // Start is after end\n\t\t\tEndsAt:    startTime,   // End is before start\n\t\t\tCreatedBy: \"test-user\",\n\t\t\tComment:   \"Invalid silence\",\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tbody, err := json.Marshal(silences)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\treq, err := http.NewRequest(http.MethodPost, \"/api/v1/silences/bulk\", bytes.NewReader(body))\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\treq.Header.Set(\"Content-Type\", \"application/json\")\n\n\tresult := api.bulkSilences(req)\n\trequire.NotNil(t, result.err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, errorBadData, result.err.typ)\n\t// Error message should include the index of the failing silence\n\trequire.Contains(t, result.err.Error(), \"1\")\n}\n\nfunc TestBulkSilencesInvalidJSON(t *testing.T) {\n\tapi := &API{\n\t\tready: func(f http.HandlerFunc) http.HandlerFunc { return f },\n\t}\n\n\treq, err := http.NewRequest(http.MethodPost, \"/api/v1/silences/bulk\", bytes.NewReader([]byte(\"invalid json\")))\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\treq.Header.Set(\"Content-Type\", \"application/json\")\n\n\tresult := api.bulkSilences(req)\n\trequire.NotNil(t, result.err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, errorBadData, result.err.typ)\n}\n\nfunc TestBulkSilencesInvalidMatcherName(t *testing.T) {\n\tapi := &API{\n\t\tready: func(f http.HandlerFunc) http.HandlerFunc { return f },\n\t}\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tstartTime := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tendTime := now.Add(2 * time.Hour)\n\n\t// Invalid silence: matcher with empty name\n\tsilences := []SilenceInput{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tMatchers: []SilenceMatcher{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"\", Value: \"test\", IsRegex: false, IsEqual: true}, // Empty matcher name\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tStartsAt:  startTime,\n\t\t\tEndsAt:    endTime,\n\t\t\tCreatedBy: \"test-user\",\n\t\t\tComment:   \"Invalid silence\",\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tbody, err := json.Marshal(silences)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\treq, err := http.NewRequest(http.MethodPost, \"/api/v1/silences/bulk\", bytes.NewReader(body))\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\treq.Header.Set(\"Content-Type\", \"application/json\")\n\n\tresult := api.bulkSilences(req)\n\trequire.NotNil(t, result.err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, errorBadData, result.err.typ)\n}\n\nfunc TestBulkSilencesCreatesBulkErrorDetail(t *testing.T) {\n\tapi := &API{\n\t\tready: func(f http.HandlerFunc) http.HandlerFunc { return f },\n\t}\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tstartTime := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tendTime := now.Add(2 * time.Hour)\n\n\t// Multiple silences with one invalid in the middle\n\tsilences := []SilenceInput{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tMatchers: []SilenceMatcher{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"job\", Value: \"valid1\", IsRegex: false, IsEqual: true},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tStartsAt:  startTime,\n\t\t\tEndsAt:    endTime,\n\t\t\tCreatedBy: \"test-user\",\n\t\t\tComment:   \"Valid silence 1\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tMatchers: []SilenceMatcher{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"\", Value: \"invalid\", IsRegex: false, IsEqual: true}, // Invalid - empty name\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tStartsAt:  startTime,\n\t\t\tEndsAt:    endTime,\n\t\t\tCreatedBy: \"test-user\",\n\t\t\tComment:   \"Invalid silence\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tMatchers: []SilenceMatcher{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"job\", Value: \"valid2\", IsRegex: false, IsEqual: true},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tStartsAt:  startTime,\n\t\t\tEndsAt:    endTime,\n\t\t\tCreatedBy: \"test-user\",\n\t\t\tComment:   \"Valid silence 2\",\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tbody, err := json.Marshal(silences)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\treq, err := http.NewRequest(http.MethodPost, \"/api/v1/silences/bulk\", bytes.NewReader(body))\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\treq.Header.Set(\"Content-Type\", \"application/json\")\n\n\tresult := api.bulkSilences(req)\n\trequire.NotNil(t, result.err)\n\t// Should fail on the second silence (index 1)\n\trequire.Contains(t, result.err.Error(), \"1\")\n}\n",
  "file_path": "/workspace/web/api/v1/silences_bulk_test.go"
}

{

License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\n// WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\n// See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\n// limitations under the License.\n\npackage v1\n\nimport (\n\t\"bytes\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"net/http\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/require\"\n)\n\n// SilenceMatcher represents a matcher for a silence.\ntype SilenceMatcher struct {\n\tName    string `json:\"name\"`\n\tValue   string `json:\"value\"`\n\tIsRegex bool   `json:\"isRegex\"`\n\tIsEqual bool   `json:\"isEqual\"`\n}\n\n// SilenceInput represents the input data for creating a silence.\ntype SilenceInput struct {\n\tMatchers  []SilenceMatcher `json:\"matchers\"`\n\tStartsAt  time.Time BulkSilenceResponse represents the response for bulk silence creation.\ntype BulkSilenceResponse struct {\n\tSilenceIDs []string `json:\"silenceIDs\"`\n}\n\n// BulkSilenceError represents an error response for bulk silence creation.\ntype BulkSilenceErrorDetail struct {\n\tIndex   int    `json:\"index\"`\n\tMessage string `json:\"message\"`\n}\n\nfunc TestBulkSilencesSuccess(t *testing.T) Verify all IDs are non-empty\n\tfor _, id := range bulkResp.SilenceIDs {\n\t\trequire.NotEmpty(t, id)\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestBulkSilencesEmptyArray(t *testing.T) {\n\tapi := &API{\n\t\tready: func(f api.bulkSilences(req)\n\trequire.Nil(t, result.err)\n\trequire.NotNil(t, result.data)\n\n\tbulkResp, ok := result.data.(BulkSilenceResponse)\n\trequire.True(t, ok)\n\trequire.Len(t, bulkResp.SilenceIDs, 0)\n}\n\nfunc TestBulkSilencesValidationFailure(t *testing.T) {\n\tapi := &API{\n\t\tready: func(f http.HandlerFunc) http.HandlerFunc { return f },\n\t}\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tstartTime := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tendTime := now.Add(2 * time.Hour)\n\n\t// Invalid silence: no matchers\n\tsilences := []SilenceInput{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tMatchers:  []SilenceMatcher{}, // Empty matchers - should fail validation\n\t\t\tStartsAt:  startTime,\n\t\t\tEndsAt:    endTime,\n\t\t\tCreatedBy: \"test-user\",\n\t\t\tComment:   \"Invalid silence\",\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tbody, err := json.Marshal(silences)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\treq, err := http.NewRequest(http.MethodPost, \"/api/v1/silences/bulk\", bytes.NewReader(body))\n\trequire.NoError(t, TestBulkSilencesPartialValidationFailure(t *testing.T) {\n\tapi := &API{\n\t\tready: func(f http.HandlerFunc) http.HandlerFunc { return f },\n\t}\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tstartTime := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tendTime := now.Add(2 * time.Hour)\n\n\t// Second silence is invalid: endsAt is before startsAt\n\tsilences := []SilenceInput{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tMatchers: []SilenceMatcher{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"job\", Value: \"valid\", IsRegex: false, IsEqual: true},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tStartsAt:  startTime,\n\t\t\tEndsAt:    endTime,\n\t\t\tCreatedBy: \"test-user\",\n\t\t\tComment:   \"Valid silence\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tMatchers: []SilenceMatcher{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"job\", Value: \"invalid\", IsRegex: false, IsEqual: true},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tStartsAt:  endTime,     // Start is after end\n\t\t\tEndsAt:    startTime,   // End is before start\n\t\t\tCreatedBy: \"test-user\",\n\t\t\tComment:   \"Invalid silence\",\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tbody, err := json.Marshal(silences)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\treq, err := http.NewRequest(http.MethodPost, \"/api/v1/silences/bulk\", bytes.NewReader(body))\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\treq.Header.Set(\"Content-Type\", \"application/json\")\n\n\tresult := api.bulkSilences(req)\n\trequire.NotNil(t, result.err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, errorBadData, result.err.typ)\n\t// Error message should include the index of the failing silence\n\trequire.Contains(t, result.err.Error(), \"1\")\n}\n\nfunc TestBulkSilencesInvalidJSON(t *testing.T) {\n\tapi := &API{\n\t\tready: func(f http.HandlerFunc) http.HandlerFunc { return f },\n\t}\n\n\treq, err := http.NewRequest(http.MethodPost, \"/api/v1/silences/bulk\", bytes.NewReader([]byte(\"invalid json\")))\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\treq.Header.Set(\"Content-Type\", \"application/json\")\n\n\tresult := api.bulkSilences(req)\n\trequire.NotNil(t, result.err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, errorBadData, result.err.typ)\n}\n\nfunc TestBulkSilencesInvalidMatcherName(t *testing.T) {\n\tapi := &API{\n\t\tready: func(f http.HandlerFunc) http.HandlerFunc { return f },\n\t}\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tstartTime := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tendTime := now.Add(2 * time.Hour)\n\n\t// Invalid silence: matcher with empty name\n\tsilences := []SilenceInput{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tMatchers: []SilenceMatcher{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"\", Value: \"test\", IsRegex: false, IsEqual: true}, // Empty matcher name\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tStartsAt:  startTime,\n\t\t\tEndsAt:    endTime,\n\t\t\tCreatedBy: \"test-user\",\n\t\t\tComment:   \"Invalid silence\",\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tbody, err := json.Marshal(silences)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\treq, err := http.NewRequest(http.MethodPost, \"/api/v1/silences/bulk\", bytes.NewReader(body))\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\treq.Header.Set(\"Content-Type\", \"application/json\")\n\n\tresult := api.bulkSilences(req)\n\trequire.NotNil(t, result.err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, errorBadData, result.err.typ)\n}\n\nfunc TestBulkSilencesCreatesBulkErrorDetail(t *testing.T) {\n\tapi := &API{\n\t\tready: func(f http.HandlerFunc) http.HandlerFunc { return f },\n\t}\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tstartTime := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tendTime := now.Add(2 * time.Hour)\n\n\t// Multiple silences with one invalid in the middle\n\tsilences := []SilenceInput{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tMatchers: []SilenceMatcher{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"job\", Value: \"valid1\", IsRegex: false, IsEqual: true},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tStartsAt:  startTime,\n\t\t\tEndsAt:    endTime,\n\t\t\tCreatedBy: \"test-user\",\n\t\t\tComment:   \"Valid silence 1\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tMatchers: []SilenceMatcher{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"\", Value: \"invalid\", IsRegex: false, IsEqual: true}, // Invalid - empty name\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tStartsAt:  startTime,\n\t\t\tEndsAt:    endTime,\n\t\t\tCreatedBy: \"test-user\",\n\t\t\tComment:   \"Invalid silence\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tMatchers: []SilenceMatcher{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"job\", Value: \"valid2\", IsRegex: false, IsEqual: true},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tStartsAt:  startTime,\n\t\t\tEndsAt:    endTime,\n\t\t\tCreatedBy: \"test-user\",\n\t\t\tComment:   \"Valid silence 2\",\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tbody, err := json.Marshal(silences)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\treq, err := http.NewRequest(http.MethodPost, \"/api/v1/silences/bulk\", bytes.NewReader(body))\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\treq.Header.Set(\"Content-Type\", \"application/json\")\n\n\tresult := api.bulkSilences(req)\n\trequire.NotNil(t, result.err)\n\t// Should fail on the second silence (index 1)\n\trequire.Contains(t, result.err.Error(), \"1\")\n}\n",
  "filePath": "/workspace/web/api/v1/silences_bulk_test.go",
  "originalFile": null,
  "structuredPatch": [],
  "type": "create"
}

137. Read @ -
Input
{
  "file_path": "/workspace/web/api/v1/api.go",
  "limit": 30,
  "offset": 2200
}
Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "// truncateResults truncates result for queryRange() and query().\n// No truncation for other types(Scalars or Strings).\nfunc truncateResults(result *promql.Result, limit int) (*promql.Result, bool) {\n\tisTruncated := false\n\n\tswitch v := result.Value.(type) {\n\tcase promql.Matrix:\n\t\tif len(v) > limit {\n\t\t\tresult.Value = v[:limit]\n\t\t\tisTruncated = true\n\t\t}\n\tcase promql.Vector:\n\t\tif len(v) > limit {\n\t\t\tresult.Value = v[:limit]\n\t\t\tisTruncated = true\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Return the modified result. Unchanged for other types.\n\treturn result, isTruncated\n}\n",
    "filePath": "/workspace/web/api/v1/api.go",
    "numLines": 22,
    "startLine": 2200,
    "totalLines": 2221
  },
  "type": "text"
}
